Name: ELECTROPLANET
Description:
Electroplanet est le Plus Grand Spécialiste au Maroc de l’Electroménager, TV, Hifi et Multimédia, qui s’engage sur les meilleurs services, le plus large choix et les offres les plus attrayantes.

S’inscrivant dans une politique de proximité, Electroplanet a inauguré son premier magasin à Marrakech en Novembre 2008 et a pu se développer rapidement et étoffer son réseau. L’enseigne compte désormais à son actif 45 magasins dans les principales villes du Royaume (Marrakech, Casablanca, Rabat, Tanger, Mohammedia, Salé, Agadir, Fès, Oujda, Kenitra, El Jadida, Tétouan, Nador, Safi, Meknès) et son nouveau site Internet www.electroplanet.ma à vocation marchande lancé en 2018.

Electroplanet est une enseigne orientée 100% client qui se différencie dans son domaine d’activité par :

o	Le plus grand choix de produits avec plus de 2000 références à la pointe de la technologie, et plus de 60 marques différentes.
o	Un large réseau commercial de magasins ouverts 7 jours sur 7, de 9h à 22h avec parking disponible.
o	Les meilleurs prix ainsi que des promotions et des offres exclusives tout au long de l’année.
o	La livraison et l’installation gratuites des articles achetés.
o	Un Service Après-Vente (SAV) 100% garanti.
o	Des conseils à l’achat, à l’installation et à l’utilisation.
o	Des formules de financement et de crédit gratuit sur place.
...Mais Electroplanet, c'est surtout plus de 1 200 collaborateurs, des Femmes et des Hommes animés par une culture d'entreprise et des valeurs très fortes qui sont :

o	LA PASSION
o	LE CLIENT
o	L'INNOVATION
o	L'AGILITE

Name: Nagem
Description:
A Nagem é uma empresa com experiência no mercado de comercialização de produtos de alta tecnologia, escritório e papelaria. Atua desde 1990 e hoje já é referência em seu setor, com mais de 2 mil colaboradores, o foco é comercializar produtos das melhores marcas, indo desde equipamentos e suprimentos de informática e tecnologia, passando por softwares, material de escritório e papelaria, são mais de 6 mil itens. As linhas são 100% atualizadas, atuamos nos mercados de varejo, e-commerce, corporativo e distribuição. 

Para estar sempre perto de você e da sua empresa - seja ela de pequeno, médio ou grande porte - contamos com amplos estoques e escritórios nas unidades de negócios em Recife, São Paulo, Salvador e Fortaleza. Para oferecer sempre as melhores soluções, a Nagem mantém seu portfólio de produtos o mais atualizado possível, contando com o que há de melhor e com as mais recentes novidades. 

Hoje são mais de 210 marcas, dentre as melhores do mercado, atendendo assim todas as necessidades de seus clientes e parceiros, além de oferecer produtos com a garantia de quem é distribuidor oficial de todas as marcas que comercializa. 

Missão e Visão é comercializar produtos e serviços de qualidade que atendam às necessidades, os desejos e as expectativas de nossos clientes. Somos uma empresa comercial e de tecnologia de ponta. Queremos ser uma empresa competitiva, confiável, e com responsabilidade social e ambiental, com foco em crescimento contínuo e sustentável do negócio, de que todos nos orgulhamos de ser colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores.

A Nagem tem a filosofia de ser sempre um referencial na prestação de serviços no mercado, atingindo a excelência na qualidade através da valorização de nossos fornecedores, clientes e recursos humanos, garantindo assim, a constante satisfação de nossos clientes. Nossos valores são: Compromisso com os clientes, respeito às pessoas e ética nos negócios.

Name: Daikin Malaysia Sales & Service Sdn Bhd
Description:
Daikin Malaysia Sales & Service Sdn. Bhd (DMSS) is subsidiary company of Daikin Industries, Ltd. Japan and marketing company for DAIKIN air conditioner (unitary products) and DEWPOINT products in Malaysia. Since its establishment in 1975, the company has been experienced unparalleled growth and development through its efforts in bringing cool comfort to millions of Malaysian.

In 1991, DMSS continued to reach greater heights by becoming one of the subsidiaries of Daikin Malaysia Sdn Bhd, one of the leading manufacturer of HVAC products (heating, ventilation and air-conditioning) and also a member of the DAIKIN group Japan. Additionally in 15th October 2014, DMSS has granted the opportunity to distribute the DAIKIN Brand.

Over the years, DMSS has dedicated to giving you the very best of high quality air conditioner products with fast and excellent services. Our ten branches, with our head office in Selangor, strategically located throughout Malaysia including Sabah and Sarawak supported with integrated advanced computer system enables us to provide fast and reliable services to our customers.

With our excellent service and high quality products we offer the peace of mind, confidence, and reliability that come with experience and a commitment to customer satisfaction. DMSS is committed to provide highest quality products at affordable cost along with reliable after sales services to our customers. We believe that we will able to achieve even greater success with a dynamic vision in the future

The company quickly expanded its operations throughout Kenya, and by 2002 is was on the region's largest retailers and wholesalers of consumer electronics and entertainment products.

Founded on the philosophy of Customer Value and Service. The company's success is dependent on building and maintaining customer loyalty.

Through strong supplier partnerships, we expect to provide customers with quality products featuring the latest technology, while offering unparalleled after-sales service.


Our Vision -   To enhance the lifestyle of our Eastern African Customers

Our Mission -   To supply and support domestic and commercial electronic appliances

Name: Perfect Pool Chile
Description:
Perfect Pool es el especialista en temperado de piscinas en todo Chile.
Estamos a la vanguardia en tecnología y conocimientos, entregando a nuestros clientes la seguridad que han hecho una muy buena elección, con resultados tangibles y a bajo costo.
Destacamos entre nuestra principales ventajas:

Temperatura
Temperamos tu piscina entre 28 y 30 grados
Posibilita poder disfrutar de tu piscina desde los meses de septiembre a mayo.

Energetico
Muy bajo consumo energético
Gracias a los principios termodinámicos, la bomba de calor consume 1kW por hora (valor $90 promedio en Chile), para generar una potencia de calentamiento de 5 kW/h.

Armar
Instalación fácil a un costado del filtro de la piscina
Nuestra empresa cuenta con un equipo técnico experto y dispuesto asesorar a sus clientes frente a cualquier inquietud o dificultad.

**La garantía se mantiene mientras al equipo se le realicen manteciones anuales.

Solucion
Solución limpia, segura y no invasiva
Al preferir alternativas de calefacción eficientes y limpias, se contribuye con el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Enfoque
Servicio enfocado
Nuestro servicio de temperado de piscinas está dirigido a casas particulares, condominios, hoteles y otros; logrando con nuestros equipos cambiar radicalmente el funcionamiento de su piscina.

Chile Point
Atención en todo Chile
Nuestras oficinas se encuentran ubicadas en la Región Metropolitana. Contamos con una amplia capacidad técnica y logística que nos permite abarcar nuestro servicio en todo el territorio nacional.

PART OF MIDDLEBY RESIDENTIAL

Stanley, AGA, Rangemaster, Rayburn, Falcon, Mercury, La Cornue, Novy, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt and Char-Griller are just some of the brands under the Middleby brand. Description:
In 2002, New Market Company began its journey by importing and distributing gift items to hospitals and gift shops. The positive reception led NMC to expand its offerings, incorporating a wide range of toys and RC plane merchandise.

In 2008, NMC took a significant stride forward by establishing a workshop, coinciding with the global rise of DJI. The workshop gained rapid popularity, prompting NMC to engage with DJI to import and distribute their drones in Kuwait, achieving considerable success.

This success propelled NMC to retail hundreds of DJI products within months, culminating in the opening of Falcon Vision. Beyond financial success, our dedication stems from a shared passion for this hobby with our customers.

In 2014, NMC proudly introduced the first DJI Authorized Retail Store in the Arab Region, underscoring our commitment to delivering high-quality drone and related products to enthusiasts and professionals alike.

Today NMC is a proud distributors to many international brands such as EcoFlow, Lefeet, Segway, Akaso, ARP pedia, PGYtech, Telesin, Hover Air and many more.

سيتميز المتجر بتوفير مجموعة واسعة من الماركات الرائدة في صناعة التكنولوجيا، بما في ذلك أجهزة Apple وSamsung وMicrosoft وSony وغيرها الكثير. ستجد أحدث الطرازات والإصدارات الجديدة، بالإضافة إلى خيارات متنوعة تتناسب مع مختلف الميزانيات واحتياجات العملاء.

بالإضافة إلى ذلك، سيقدم المتجر خدمات مميزة مثل ضمانات موثوقة، وتوصيل سريع وآمن للمنتجات، وخدمة عملاء متميزة تقدم المساعدة والاستشارات للعملاء فيما يتعلق باختيار المنتجات المناسبة وحل أي استفسارات تقنية.

بالإضافة إلى المنتجات الجاهزة للبيع، يمكن أن يتضمن المتجر قسمًا للمراجعات والمقالات التقنية، حيث يمكن للعملاء الاطلاع على آخر اتجاهات التكنولوجيا والمعلومات القيمة قبل اتخاذ قرارات الشراء.

باختصار، سيوفر هذا المتجر الإلكتروني لعملائه تجربة تسوق ممتازة وشاملة لمنتجات تقنية المعلومات وأجهزة الإلكترونيات. سيعمل المتجر على تلبية احتياجات العملاء من خلال توفير تشكيلة واسعة من المنتجات عالية الجودة، وتقديم خدمة عملاء استثنائية، وضمان رضا العملاء من خلال تجربة تسوق سلسة ومرضية.

The nayapurano story began with the realization that if you can trade in a used car, you should be able to trade in a used phone. Back in early 2022, with a bunch of colleagues and the willpower to make a change. Slowly and steadily, we started laying the foundation, that today is known as nayapurano.shop
At Nayapurano, we don't want you to buy more; we want you to buy smarter. We want to help you make better choices and keep your device for two, three, or even five years before you need a new model. When you're ready to upgrade, we guarantee to buy back your product at the best price and find it a new home.
Every time we rehome a phone, we’re already helping in minimizing e-waste as well as reducing the carbon footprint of the device. We also plant a tree every time we buy or sell a phone, to help offset even more carbon dioxide. We are an organization that values a good cause more than just our profits.
Whenever you buy a product from nayapurano, we send it to you in a box which contains not only your phone but a seed as well. All you need to do is plant the seed. That’s it. As simple as it can be. Your one small step can help us heal our planet. Together, we might just be able to make a difference. Let’s be the change.

Name: Electromagic
Description:
Electromagic is a successful, self-financed company, with a history of over 20 years and a leader in the Albanian market representing Miele, Teka, KitchenAid, Hagen, Vox Electronics, and Nilfisk. The brands offer B2C & B2B quality solutions.

Electromagic started out with a small domestic appliances store in Tirana in 2002, but as a result of hard work and dedication, the company now has 8  showrooms in cities like Tirana, Fier,Vlore, Elbasan, Lushnje and has more than 50 partners around Albania. 

Electromagic introduced for the first time the German brand Miele to the Albanian market, which is also known as the world’s leading manufacturer of premium domestic appliances. Miele also meets the needs of businesses with their professional line “Miele Professional” which offers quality appliances for hotels, restaurants, bars, and laundry.

With the growth, development, and recognition of customer and market needs, Electromagic expanded in 2010 with the Spanish brand TEKA which originated from Germany. TEKA offers a different big range of home appliances including sinks and taps.

In 2017, Electromagic expanded by adding the Vox Electronics brand, which meets its customers’ needs with the best quality-to-price ratio for domestic appliances and small kitchen appliances. Vox Electronics is a well-known international brand with its headquarters in Beograd.

Electromagic provides the best technical service to its customers, having an in-house service department.

The quality of our customers’ lives is really important to us, therefore we create relationships with our customers, not transactions.

Em 2022, a Coifas Gourmet deu mais um passo significativo ao construir um novo Centro de Distribuição, expandindo a capilaridade da marca e criando condições para o desenvolvimento de um plano de expansão por meio de franquias. Esse marco consolidou ainda mais seu modelo de negócio, fortalecendo sua presença no mercado e possibilitando que mais pessoas tenham acesso aos produtos e ao atendimento diferenciado da empresa.

Name: Thermomix Vietnam
Description:
Vorwerk & Co. KG được thành lập năm 1883 tại Wuppertal, CHLB Đức. Trong suốt 137 năm lịch sử của công ty, từ một công ty chuyên sản xuất thảm, đã phát triển thành một tập đoàn toàn cầu đa dạng hóa cao. Cho đến ngày nay Vorwerk vẫn duy trì mô hình tập đoàn gia đình.

Đội ngũ thiết kế kỹ thuật của Vorwerk luôn mang đến thị trường những sản phẩm gia dụng mới mẻ và đầy sáng tạo. Có hơn 120 thành viên trong đội ngũ Nghiên cứu và Phát triển, làm việc thường xuyên với những ý tưởng mới sáng tạo, được minh chứng bằng một số lượng lớn bằng phát minh sáng chế mà họ đạt được. Chỉ tính riêng với chiếc Thermomix TM5, đã có 151 phát minh được cấp bằng sáng chế. Những sản phẩm đặc sắc của Thermomix  đều được sản xuất tại các cơ sở sản xuất của công ty tại Wuppertal, Đức và Cloyes, Pháp.

Công ty Cổ Phần Modern Cook là công ty được thành lập dựa trên triết lý kinh doanh giúp cuộc sống của người Việt trở nên tốt đẹp hơn. Công ty Cổ phần Modern Cook là nhà phân phối chính thức sản phẩm Thermomix của Tập đoàn Vorwerk International tại Việt Nam.

Được thành lập từ năm 2017, Modern Cook JSC đã có hơn 5 năm hoạt động tích cực với nhiều dấu ấn thành công tại Việt Nam. Cộng đồng Khách hàng Thermomix tại Việt Nam với hàng ngàn thành viên hào hứng chia sẻ các khoảnh khắc hạnh phúc cùng các món ăn tuyệt hảo hàng ngày. Modern Cook JSC cũng đã rất thành công khi xây dựng hệ sinh thái công thức món ăn Việt đa dạng, một đặc quyền chỉ dành riêng cho Khách hàng của mình tại Việt Nam, giúp Thermomix trở nên vô cùng gần gũi và hiệu quả trong hành trình ẩm thực hàng ngày của các gia đình Việt.

Name: test&measurements A/S
Description:
Ånden fra Metric er fortsat stærk
Med etableringen af virksomheden Test & Measurements A/S fortsætter Michael Bülow, hvor Metric for ikke så længe siden slap på det danske marked. For hvem skal man ringe til, når man ikke kan finde det test- og EMC-måleudstyr, man leder efter?

Af Rolf Sylvester-Hvid
Man siger jo, at arbejde adler – og at adel forpligter. Binder vi de to påstande sammen, så kan man måske godt forstå, at Michael Bülow i en alder af 68 starter forfra med et nyt firma, Test & Measurements A/S. Men forpligtelsen hænger sammen med historien, og historien starter i Hassellunden, hvor Metric A/S i en årrække havde til huse. Michael Bülow var eneste medarbejder, der var tilbage i det daværende Metric A/S, som Addtech-koncernen valgte at lukke ved udgangen af 2020. Men Michael Bülow fortsatte dog i bygningen hos Recab.
Selv om Addtech-koncernen har en ganske stor spændvidde inden for elektronikken og det elektrotekniske område, så er der dog i den svenske koncern blevet skruet noget ned for test- og måleudstyrsområdet. Det fjerner dog ikke behovet på markedet, og Metric havde placeret sig meget fint inden for EMC-tests, elektromagnetisk støjskærmning generelt og meget højfrekvente målinger i felten. Og Metric var typisk én af de virksomheder, mange ville ringe til, når de ikke lige kunne finde dét, de søgte til en given opgave.
- Der var tydeligvis et behov for at videreføre ”ånden fra Metric”, og som sidste mand på pinden, så kunne jeg jo godt se, hvilken vej det ville bære. I september i år kom jeg i snak med Kim Jørgensen, der er direktør for installationsforretningen, Kallesøe, og han kunne godt se, at der var et behov for de services og produkter, der tidligere blev distribueret via Metric. Det har så ført til, at jeg nu har kontor på Kallesøes adresse i Herlev, hvorfra jeg hjælper markedet som konsulent og viderefører en række af de agenturer, der tidligere var på Metrics portefølje. Navnet kunne jeg ikke få med, men produkterne er til rådighed, og da

Name: GOODSERCLE
Description:
Since 2009, GOODSERCLE has been building a smarter way to deal with bulky household waste — by extending appliance life before it becomes “waste.”
We’re a Melbourne-based social enterprise focused on intercepting whitegoods before they’re prematurely scrapped by e-waste processors. Instead, we repair, refurbish and rehome appliances like fridges and washing machines — reducing environmental harm, supporting households, and creating meaningful local jobs.

Here’s what we do:
 Extend appliance life
Most whitegoods are discarded long before the end of their usable life. We intercept them early — reducing waste, recovering value, and offering affordable appliances to households who need them.
 Create local jobs in the repair economy
Our circular model supports inclusive employment and skills training — especially for those locked out of traditional pathways.
 Partner with local councils, businesses and community groups
We work closely with local governments and grassroots organisations to embed reuse into bulky waste systems — making circular living practical and community-powered.

Why it matters:
Premature recycling is still waste. We believe in keeping value in the community — and designing out waste before it begins.
If you’re building circular systems, testing new models of reuse, or want to explore repair-led impact — we’d love to connect.
 Based in Melbourne |  goodsercle.com.au
#CircularWhitegoods #RepairEconomy #SocialEnterprise #GOODSERCLE

Description:
Привіт, нумо знайомитись :) Ми — Ябко

Ябко — мережа магазинів особливої техніки.

Ябко робить покупку техніки особливою подією. Кожен контакт із користувачами ми намагаємось зробити особливим: у сервісі чи комунікації. 

Кожен в Ябко – це емпатичний друг, який дуже добре розуміє твої почуття, переживання та емоції. Бо теж був на твому місці, теж купував перший iPhone і радів, коли знімав із нього плівку. Він теж спочатку не зрозумів, “у чому фішка Dyson”. Але згодом розібрався і розповів друзям. Бо для нас важливо що б і тобі відгукувалось як нам. 

Команда ЯБКО постійно розвивається, тому ми шукаємо нові таланти в команду: Дружніх, Чесних та Амбітних людей, які разом із Ябко могли б підкорювати нові вершини та цілі. Емпатичність, вміння взаємодіяти в команді, орієнтація на результат та ініціативність завжди буде вашим козирем у рукаві.

Робота в Ябко — ідеальне місце для закоханих в особливу техніку.

Знайти роботу в Ябко можна у всіх куточках України.

Name: Sunology
Description:
Le XXIe siècle sera le siècle de l’énergie solaire directe. Ce changement de paradigme énergétique est soutenu par Sunology qui offre à tous la possibilité de transformer partout l’énergie solaire en électricité. Clé de voûte de ce changement : l’équipement solaire individuel et les technologies d’autonomies. Toiture sur-mesure et intelligente ; station prête à brancher ; application de pilotage et suivi; batterie hybride et modulaire : de haute qualité et accessible financièrement, le produit Sunology permet aux particuliers de passer au solaire sans s’en faire et de reprendre le pouvoir. Avec Sunology, ils sont libres et deviennent riches en énergie

L’équipement Sunology est pensé comme un essentiel de la maison de demain. Dépassant une logique utilitaire, alliant tech et design, ils sont le fruit d’une politique d’innovation continue. Beaux, performants, vertueux et futuristes : voilà comment les consommateurs perçoivent les produits Sunology. Et à travers eux, c’est un nouvel
imaginaire qui réconcilie le consommateur et le citoyen : celui d’un mode de vie autonome, confortable, sécurisant.

Dès lors, en redonnant au soleil son statut de bien commun, Sunology confirme son statut d’entreprise à mission et propose une utilisation de l’énergie solaire cohérente avec son époque. Consciente de son rôle social, ses équipements solaires high-tech sont assemblés en France depuis des usines adaptées. L’entreprise mise également sur l’éducation et la formation au solaire pour impliquer les citoyens. Enfin, Sunology assume son statut de leader en prenant position sur des sujets majeurs : la création d’une filière de recyclage et réemploi pour les équipements photovoltaïques d’une part, et la réindustrialisation
européenne du secteur, d’autre part.

 Notre objectif est clair : lutter contre la surconsommation et réduire l'impact écologique.

 Le Made In France au coeur de notre projet 

Défenseurs du Made In France, nous avons fait le choix d’une production locale. Tous nos produits sont reconditionnés dans nos ateliers à Nice.
REBORN dispose du plus grand réseau de distribution en France. Vous pouvez retrouver notre marque dans les rayons de grandes enseignes françaises telles que Fnac, Darty, Bouygues, Boulanger, Electro Depot  et bien d'autres.

Al Yousuf Electronics was also the first in the UAE to launch a homegrown brand, Yenmade, offering reliable and affordable household electrical products. Additionally, we are proud to be the regional agents for the renowned Italian brand Tecnogas.

Our extensive retail network, modern showrooms, and fully equipped service centers across the UAE ensure customer satisfaction with top-notch after-sales support.

Description:
Impressum: https://www.medimax.de/impressum 

MEDIMAX – Mehr Mensch. Mehr Team.

Ein Anspruch, den wir täglich leben. Als renommierter und zukunftsorientierter Elektrofachmarkt überzeugt MEDIMAX mit einem sich ständig aktualisierenden Sortiment von über 50.000 Artikeln namhafter Hersteller aus allen Bereichen der Technik. Unseren Erfolg verdanken wir vor allem den vielen MEDIMAX Teams rund um unsere engagierten Franchisepartner. Sie sind es, die mit Beratungskompetenz, Leidenschaft und feinem Gespür die Kundschaft begeistern: Jeden Tag aufs Neue, an über 70 Standorten in Deutschland, seit 1988, darauf sind wir stolz!

MEHR REGIONALITÄT.
MEDIMAX bringt Technik nach Hause. Ein wesentlicher Punkt unseres Leistungsversprechens ist, neben menschlich-empathischem Kundenservice, die regionale Ausrichtung der Märkte. Die Inhaber jedes einzelnen Standortes handeln ganz nach dem Motto „Aus der Region, für die Region“. Damit zeigt MEDIMAX Gesicht und ist Teil der Heimat. Die sympathischen und individuellen Teams bringen den Menschen Technik näher und tragen dazu bei, dass sie sich bei MEDIMAX wohlfühlen.

MEHR TEAM.
Wir sind wie eine Großfamilie! Hinter jedem Markt steckt ein individuelles, professionelles und gut geschultes Team. Bei MEDIMAX geht es um „Mehr Mensch“ und das gilt besonders für unsere Mitarbeitenden. Die Persönlichkeit eines jeden einzelnen, der Einsatz für MEDIMAX und die Aufgaben im Fachmarkt sind Teil des großen Ganzen. „Mensch zu Mensch“ im Kundengespräch sowie „Mensch zu Mensch“ im Team macht uns stark und ist entscheidend für unseren bisherigen und zukünftigen Erfolg.
Weil „Mehr Mensch. Mehr Team.“ mehr als ein Spruch ist.

Bist Du mutig, neugierig und technikbegeistert? Dann werde jetzt Teil unseres Netzwerks und gestalte gemeinsam mit uns die Zukunft von MEDIMAX!
Alle aktuellen Stellenanzeigen sowie weitere Informationen rund um die Themen Arbeiten und Karriere bei MEDIMAX findest du auf unserer Karriereseite. Wir freuen uns auf Deine Bewerbung!

Name: Renco
Description:
Renco SARL, une entreprise spécialisée dans le domaine de l'électricité en moyenne tension, basée à Sfax en Tunisie. Depuis sa création en 2016, la société a réussi à réunir une équipe de spécialistes expérimentés qui offre à nos clients un large éventail de services de qualité supérieure.
Renco possède un savoir-faire inégalé dans divers domaines liés à l'électricité en moyenne tension. Elle se concentre sur la compensation de l'énergie réactive et le filtrage d'harmoniques, qui sont des aspects essentiels pour optimiser la qualité de l'alimentation électrique dans les réseaux de moyenne tension. Elle est également spécialisée dans la protection contre la foudre et l'étude du rayon de protection humaine, corporelle et structurelle. Une équipe de professionnels qualifiés met tout en œuvre pour garantir la sécurité des personnes et des infrastructures contre les effets néfastes des décharges électriques.
En plus de ces services, Renco propose des solutions d'entretien préventif et curatif pour les postes de transformation électrique. Nous assurons la maintenance et la réparation de vos équipements afin de prévenir les pannes et d'optimiser la durée de vie de vos installations.
Nous sommes fiers d'être les distributeurs officiels des batteries de condensateur de la marque ICAR en Tunisie. Nous vendons et installons ces batteries haut de gamme pour optimiser l'efficacité énergétique et réduire les coûts de fonctionnement de vos installations électriques.
Chez Renco SARL, nous sommes déterminés à fournir des services de qualité exceptionnelle à nos clients, en veillant à leur satisfaction et à leur fidélité. N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour en savoir plus sur nos services ou pour demander un devis.

Kotimaisena alan yrityksenä valikoimamme on tehty suomalaisen kuluttajan tarpeisiin sopivaksi ja kaikki toimitukset tapahtuvat Suomesta käsin. Euronics on varma ja turvallinen valinta.

Olemme luotettava, kotimainen, yli 30 vuotta toiminut kodintekniikka-alanketju.

Name: Taxivision
Description:
Taxivision nasce nel 1958 nel centro di Torino e dal 1968 si trova in Via Verdi 21.

Nasce come negozio di noleggio di televisori e poco dopo amplia la propria offerta con apparecchiature audio ed elettrodomestici.

Dai primi anni ’80 abbandona il settore degli elettrodomestici per dedicarsi all’alta fedeltà e al video, divenendo in breve un punto di riferimento per gli audiofili di Torino e non solo.

In parallelo iniziano le attività di installazione di laboratori linguistici, di sonorizzazione di sale riunioni ed audio/video (come si chiamavano allora).

All’inizio degli anni ’90 è uno dei primi negozi di Torino a presentare le innovative tecnologie video “a schermo piatto”, proponendo ai propri clienti privati e aziendali sistemi audio/video basati esclusivamente schermi LCD ed al Plasma.

In parallelo amplia la propria offerta con sistemi home theater e multiroom, che aumentano l’impatto sensoriale e la fruibilità degli impianti, permettendo di realizzare veri ambienti multimediali, nelle case come nelle aziende, a partire da un unico impianto.

È ora nuovamente rivolta al futuro, con l’apertura di una nuova linea di offerta di sistemi di domotica (home automation), per permettere ai clienti di integrare gli impianti multimediali con quelli di casa e semplificarne così la gestione complessiva.

La competenza nei settori audio e video hanno portato l’azienda a diventare punto di riferimento nel settore a Torino e non solo.

Chargez chez vous, chargez partout !

PROMAKSA - NAUJOS ISTORIJOS PRADŽIAI

Esame pirmieji specializuoti GoPro kamerų ir DJI dronų atstovai (nuo 2008 m. ir nuo 2014 m. atitinkamai). Taip pat prekiaujame tvirtinimais ir priedais veiksmo įrangai, LED apšvietimu, garso įrašymo įrenginiais. Savo Promaksa servise remontuojame GoPro kameras ir DJI dronus.

Didžiausią dėmesį skiriame kokybiškam klientų aptarnavimui ir pagalbai renkantis įrangą, dalinamės ekspertiška patirtimi. Prekiaujame atrinktais, laiko patikrintais ir lyderiaujančių prekinių ženklų gaminiais, todėl nesiekiame būti pigiausi, o visuomet stengiamės sukurti didžiausią pridėtinę vertę klientams.
Suteikiame įrankius, kuriais galite įamžinti Jūsų naują istoriją!

Užsukite pas mus prieš išvykdami atostogų - GoPro kameros ar DJI dronai padės įamžinti Jūsų įsimintinas akimirkas. O jeigu esate skaitmeninio turinio kūrėjas, profesionalus fotografas ar filmuotojas, suteiksime išsamią konsultaciją ir padėsime išsirinkti tinkamiausius priedus. Jau daugiau nei 12-ą metų dalinamės sukaupta patirtimi ir žiniomis.

Visuomet stengiamės būti profesionalūs ir maksimaliai išpildyti klientų lūkesčius – tai atsispindi įmonės pavadinime - UAB Promaksa.

Įrangai suteikiame 2-jų metų garantiją;

We houden allemaal van muziek. Of dit nu hardrock of EDM of jazz is, audio is heel persoonlijk. The New Sound biedt op haar e-commerce platform een gepersonaliseerde winkel ervaring d.m.v. een digitale Personal Shopping Assistent waarbij de lifestyle en behoefte van de klant altijd centraal staat. Muziek draait voor ons niet alleen om specificaties van een product. Het gaat uiteindelijk om een selectie producten die de muziek beleving kan geven die past bij jouw leven.

Onze oplossingen zijn beschikbaar voor een brede doelgroep. De sporter die een goede hoofdtelefoon zoekt; de student die een compacte actieve audio opstelling wenst of de echte film liefhebber die een complete thuisbioscoop wil laten bouwen.

We bieden ook maatwerk. Muziek wil je ervaren maar hoef je niet altijd te zien. Ga je verbouwen? Neem dan samen met ons jouw wensen door en laat naast een elektra en ventilatieplan ook een audiovisueel plan intekenen. The New Sound heeft een breed hoogwaardig aanbod en expertise in custom audio. Door samen te werken met specialistische partners uit verschillende sectoren zorgen wij ervoor dat je optimaal kunt genieten van muziek in o.a. een buitenruimte, een cinewall, aansturing via domotica of een oplossing in een zakelijke omgeving.

Lifestyle gaat veel verder dan een audio product. Het gaat wat ons betreft over genieten van het leven. Hier geeft ons blog invulling aan waar we je kennis laten maken met fashion, tech, entertainment, architectuur en design, sport en wellness. Daarnaast delen we elke week de dikste live optredens. Met als rode draad muziek hosten we events waar deze interesse gebieden samenkomen.

Wat The New Sound concreet biedt:
1. Webshop met Personal Shopping Assistent
2. The New Sound Club (events en acties met partners)
3. Blog
4. Maatwerk (samen met partners werken we aan audiovisuele oplossingen) Voor thuis, horeca of kantoor.

Volg ons op de socials en schrijf je in op de nieuwsbrief en word een member van The New Sound Club!

Name: PT Bannister Corporindo
Description:
Indolistrik.com adalah salah satu online shop di bidang elektrikal yang terbesar di Indonesia. Indolistrik merupakan generasi kedua dari perusahaan yang bergerak lebih dari 52 tahun yaitu sejak tahun 1965 sebagai wholesale maupun retailer produk elektrikal terbesar di Jakarta. Perusahaan kami juga adalah sole distributor dari beberapa merek terkemuka di Indonesia sehingga kami adalah salah satu perusahaan yang memiliki ready stock terbanyak di Jakarta.

Dengan pengalaman mengelola perusahaan yang melayani Retailer, Wholesaler dan Project di Jabodetabek dan kota-kota lain di seluruh Indonesia, kami mendirikan indolistrik di bawah management PT. Bannister Corporindo sebagai divisi online untuk menjangkau masyarakat yang lebih luas dan memberi kemudahan bagi customer untuk berbelanja online. Indolistrik merupakan e-commerce alat listrik yang memiliki stock produk, bukan hanya menampilkan katalog produk.

Sebagai perusahaan yang sudah lama established bidang elektrikal, harga kami adalah salah satu yang termurah di Indonesia. Selain itu perusahaan kami memiliki sales dan tenaga ahli yang berpengalaman dan memiliki pengetahuan yang luas di bidangnya yang akan membuat customer merasa nyaman berhubungan dengan kami.

Kami menawarkan lebih dari 750.000 jenis produk dari 180 merek yang terkemuka. Dan kami juga berkomitmen untuk menyediakan informasi lengkap mengenai setiap produk kami sehingga memudahkan customer untuk mengenali spesifikasi barang yang dibutuhkan. Kami juga berkomitmen untuk menampilkan foto barang yang sesuai dengan barang aslinya sehingga customer dapat melihat dengan lebih jelas produk yang mereka perlukan.

Name: The Beauty of Sound GmbH
Description:
When furnishing our home, we always agreed that there should be very little technology in the living room - but great sound. Large speakers, ugly soundbars and 5.1 or 7.1 systems that fill the entire room with speakers were out of the question. 
The living room is for living and therefore excellent sound must also fit our design ideas. The design ideas of most media furniture did not convince us too.
We also want to see as few cables as possible and devices like a CD player should have their place. Streaming should also be possible, which is why the Soundboard should be an active speaker.
The result of these considerations is a new kind of audio furniture with build in speakers. 
With the Beauty of Sound Soundbar, you can enjoy high-end audio without visible technology. The soundbar is built to give you an exceptional audio experience in a well-designed and crafted sideboard. With active speaker technology, you can connect your phone via Bluetooth and other devices via RCA and Toslink connections.  
We only use robust technology and speakers that promise a long lifetime which still is the best sustainability concept in the world. You will not need an app or do software updates every time you want to use the soundbar. 

The cables all disappear in a compartment in the back. You just plug your devices in there and then run the cables to your devices in the inner compartment. This creates order.

We did binaural recordings of the sound, so visit us on www.thebeautyofsound.com to listen to the best sound on the market without visible technology.

Why you should choose us:

- Absolute Top Sound
- Best design
- No visible technology
- No cable tangle
- Furniture and loudspeaker in one
- Active loudspeaker - No additional amplifier necessary
- Easy setup
- Sustainability through longevity
- Built for usage directly on the wall
- No data collection as with other providers
- Because you will love it

Name: Bedford Camera and Video
Description:
Since 1974, Bedford Camera & Video has strived at being one of the top major retailers in the photography business. Located in the Central US, we have stores in Arkansas, Oklahoma, and Missouri that have kept customer service at the forefront.

Our founder, Stan Bedford lived by three principles—integrity, diligence, and follow-through—regardless of personal or business matters. He could ask himself the question, “At the end of the day, what kind of person are you?” and be comfortable with the answer. Living your personal life this way spills over into your professional life. Stan remembered something his father always told him, “Son, always remember you’re in the picture business.” Stan was proud of the people working for him. “I’ve assembled the greatest talent in the industry, which has been paramount to the success of Bedford Camera & Video” he said. “My honest desire is to treat them as I’d want to be treated if I were in their shoes.

People work here because they enjoy photography—and are recognized for all they do,” Stan added. He wouldn't open the stores on Sundays, explaining that it’s a day for family.

Name: Miele CZ & SK
Description:
Pro Miele mluví řada dobrých důvodů.

Od svého založení v roce 1899 se Miele řídí svým příslibem kvality s mottem „Vždy lepší“. Tím myslíme: Děláme vše pro to, abychom byli „vždy lepší“ než všichni ostatní dodavatelé a „vždy lepší“, než už jsme. Pro naše zákazníky to znamená uklidňující vědomí, že dostanou ty nejlepší domácí spotřebiče, které mohou za své peníze očekávat. Díky tomu je Miele jedinečné.

Déle než 100 let platí: Na Miele se můžete spolehnout. Jako jediný výrobce v oboru testuje společnost Miele životnost svých výrobků až na 20 let. Více než 90 procent zákazníků značky Miele v Německu zachovává společnosti Miele věrnost a značku Miele doporučuje. V kvalitě a životnosti neděláme kompromisy.

Miele znamená nejlepší výsledky a užitek při minimální spotřebě energie. V kuchyni, při praní i vysávání. To zajišťuje promyšlená technika vybavená řadou inovativních detailů, které jsou dostupné pouze u Miele. Bezpočet prvenství v testech zboží u institucí Stiftung Warentest apod. po celém světě tuto skutečnost dokládá.

V mnoha zemích je Miele nejuznávanější značkou v oboru. V německém žebříčku značek „Best Brands“ byla značka Miele dokonce označena za nejlepší značku všech dob („best brand ever“). Taková značka leccos prozradí i o svých uživatelích: Zákazníci značky Miele kladou důraz na kvalitu, mají vysoké nároky na techniku i na ekologický aspekt domácích spotřebičů.

Żywice epoksydowe i poliuretanowe: elektroizolacyjne, w tym produkty o podwyższonym przewodnictwie cieplnym oraz poliuretany odporne na UV do hermetyzacji modułów LED.

Kleje do elektroniki i przemysłu: silikonowe, anaerobowe, cyjanoakrylowe, metakrylowe, epoksydowe, poliuretanowe, utwardzane UV. 

Preparaty termoprzewodzące dozowane: kleje silikonowe, pasty termoprzewodzące, zalewy i żele silikonowe termoprzewodzące, gap fillery, 2-składnikowe zalewy utwardzalne, żywice epoksydowe i poliuretanowe. 

Materiały termoprzewodzące: termoprzewodzące, elektroizolacyjne folie silikonowe, termoprzewodzące, nieizolujące elektryczne folie grafitowe, miękkie gap fillery termoprzewodzące, termoprzewodzące klejące taśmy PSA, materiały termoprzewodzące typu „phase change”.

Klantgericht handelen is het uitgangspunt om het toonaangevende bedrijf in de multimedia branche te zijn en te blijven. Door een adequaat personeelsbeleid zijn wij in staat om onze medewerkers op te leiden tot specialisten en aan ons te binden, aangevuld met de juiste productkeuze wordt hierdoor onze kwaliteit gewaarborgd.

Echt partnerschap betekent dat je altijd beschikbaar bent voor de opdrachtgever. Met volle aandacht. Om bijvoorbeeld samen te onderzoeken wat uw wensen zijn en welke technische apparatuur u daarvoor nodig hebt. Gedegen overleg geeft immers de borging voor een efficiënte uitvoering op het moment dat het erop aankomt.

Bij De Klein - AV kunt u altijd rekenen op creatieve inbreng en deskundig advies.

Op basis van uw behoeften en voorkeuren ontwerpen wij vervolgens de oplossing die het beste bij u past, tot in detail. Omdat uw tevredenheid voorop staat, levert De Klein - Electro ook belangrijke ondersteunende diensten. Zoals technische begeleiding, installatie, onderhoud en reparatie volgens de hoogste professionele normen.

Hebt u daarbij vragen? Dan staan wij voor u klaar. Met een team van commercieel-technische specialisten. Geen antwoordapparaat, maar mensen van vlees en bloed die van de hoed en de rand weten. Een investering die de moeite loont. Niemand praat immers graag tegen een machine, en als u de moeite neemt om te bellen dan staan wij klaar om u professioneel van dienst te zijn.

Name: Gut Böckel - Keukenbeleving - Küchenmeile
Description:
Van 21 tot en met 24 september 2025 vormt het historische landgoed Gut Böckel in Rödinghausen, Duitsland, het bruisende middelpunt van de internationale keukenbranche tijdens de Küchenmeile. Acht toonaangevende merken – Miele, Whirlpool, Keller, SMEG, Jetstone, Caesarstone, Bauknecht en Beko – presenteren hier hun nieuwste innovaties, duurzame materialen en geavanceerde technologieën. Het evenement richt zich specifiek op keukenspecialisten uit de Benelux en biedt een unieke combinatie van inspiratie, innovatie en netwerkmogelijkheden.

Zondag 21 september staat in het teken van het Benelux Netwerk: een exclusieve avond tot 21.00 uur waar Nederlandse en Belgische vakhandelaren in een sfeervolle ambiance collega’s, vertegenwoordigers en branchegenoten ontmoeten. Er is volop gelegenheid om de nieuwste keukentrends voor 2026 te ontdekken, zoals biobased materialen, AI-gestuurde kookapparaten, circulaire werkbladen en eigentijds design. Keller Keukens, Caesarstone en Jetstone leggen de nadruk op duurzaamheid en stijl, terwijl Miele, Whirlpool, SMEG, Bauknecht en Beko de toekomst van keukentechnologie demonstreren.

De locatie, Gut Böckel, met zijn authentieke gebouwen en prachtige tuinen, zorgt voor een inspirerende setting waarin traditie en vooruitgang samenkomen. Bezoekers kunnen dagelijks van 9.00 tot 18.00 uur terecht, op zondag 21 september zelfs tot 21.00 uur. Voor wie rustig inspiratie en advies wil opdoen, zijn persoonlijke afspraken mogelijk tot en met 24 september.

Volg voor actuele informatie en updates de gezamenlijke LinkedIn-pagina van de deelnemende merken. Zo blijf je op de hoogte van alles rondom de Küchenmeile 2025 op Gut Böckel.

Name: MOTIQUM
Description:
We are Motiqum team, and we’re shaping the future of electric motors.

Technology is racing forward — but electric motors stayed stuck in the past: inefficient, rare-earth dependent, and not built for today’s intelligent systems.

Today, over 90% of rare-earth magnets come from one country, and export restrictions are already driving supply shortages and price spikes — A magnet-free future is no longer just sustainable — it's strategically necessary.

At the same time, global motor installations are expected to double by 2030.

It’s clear the world needs a new generation of electric motors.

Our solution is a game-changer — introducing magnet-free design,  smart components for efficiency, compact windings for higher power, and IoT for real-time intelligence.

For our customers, this means lower supply risk, lower costs, higher efficiency, and easier integration into modern systems.

Name: Digiplant
Description:
Digiplant is a connected climate controller for indoor and greenhouse environments. It monitors key growing conditions like soil moisture, temperature, humidity in real-time. The system automates irrigation & HVAC based on collected data, helping to optimize plant growth and resource use. Digiplant's hardware and software are designed for easy integration across various scales of cultivation. More on digiplant.com

**The vision**

More than ever, it is vital to collect, analyze and understand environmental data to improve cultivation and optimize resources use. This is the core concept of Agtech.
Many solutions for greenhouses are now available in the market, but most of them are either highly complex or highly expensive (sometimes both), targeting Europe/North America large facilities (>50Ha). Meanwhile, the vast majority of farms are still operating on small scale, under 5Ha (~70% of total EU farms*), with limited budget and limited use of high-tech climate controller.
The goal is to bridge this gap and offer an affordable yet powerful and modular connected solution, that can collect data, automate equipment (irrigation, HVAC...) and ultimately, improve crop year-on-year through AI, for everyone.

*Source: Eurostat - Farms in 2020
https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/statistics-explained/index.php?title=Farms_and_farmland_in_the_European_Union_-_statistics#Farms_in_2020

Description:
We are ARM Technologies Electro-Mechanical Trading. Your partner in providing you with the class-leading electronic motor control products, most flexible harmonics mitigation solution and high-speed revenue-grade power analyzers.

CLASS-LEADING MOTOR CONTROL PRODUCTS. We are an authorized distributor of CONTROL TECHNIQUES by Nidec. A company that is 100% focused on delivering world-class variable speed drives and power conversion technologies that are used in industry, commerce and renewable energy schemes. We have motor control solutions that help businesses to significantly reduce energy costs and improve operating efficiency.

MOST FLEXIBLE HARMONICS MITIGATION SOLUTION. If you have a number of variable frequency drives (also known as frequency converter) on site, you are generating electrical disturbances. These disturbances include network unbalance, flicker, and especially harmonics - not to mention the risk of regulatory non-compliance. Engineered in Sweden, our active dynamic filter (ADF) by COMSYS provides a unique way of mitigating harmonics in power systems. ADF components can also be combined with variable frequency drives to create the ultimate low harmonic solution which are ideal for system integrators or OEMs.

HIGH-SPEED REVENUE-GRADE POWER ANALYZERS. A PQube 3 power analyzer by POWERSIDE is the best investment in productivity, process quality improvement, and peace of mind you will ever make. You can save hundreds of hours by automatically measuring, recording, reporting and analyzing power measurements over days, weeks or months. You can also get real-time measurements remotely using the built-in web and email server.

Tevens bieden wij verschillende diensten aan, zoals de complete installatie van uw aangeschafte producten. Wij hebben een eigen technische dienst voor reparaties van wit- en bruingoed.  Lighting – We design intelligent lighting systems with daylight harvesting, modular and scalable setups, human-centric designs, and specialized lighting to enhance visibility and energy efficiency.

 Air, Temperature Control – Our solutions include high-efficiency evaporative cooling, smart air circulation, balanced air distribution, targeted air delivery for heat zones, exhaust planning, and thermal insulation to maintain comfort.

Description:
Our business is scales - making us a trusted and knowledgeable resource for our dealers and partners.

Kilotech’s front line team is there to offer personalized solutions to any questions you may have regarding our line of products. We engage with our customers to ensure that appropriate and confident purchasing decisions are made.

Over the past 40 years, our expertise in developing scales has grown to servicing a range of industries. We currently offer scales and support to the retail price computing and POS sector, specific applications in the food and restaurant industries, light industrial, material handling, and educational and laboratory markets. 

The people at Kilotech invest in assuring that our distribution partners are successful throughout the supply chain right down to the end user. We offer training and support in all aspects of their business, be it marketing, sales, technical, repair, Measurement Canada inspections and customer service. 

Kilotech is a fully compliant Measurement Canada accredited Authorized Service Provider and many of our products are NTEP and MC (Measurement Canada) approved. We are members of the National Conference on Weights and Measures (NCWM), the International Society of Weighing and Measurement (ISWM) and the Retail Solutions Providers Association (RSPA).

Maak een bewuste keuze en draag bij aan de circulaire economie. Door te kiezen voor refurbished, verminder je niet alleen je ecologische voetafdruk, maar voorkom je ook verspilling van waardevolle hulpbronnen en minimaliseer je afvalproductie. En bovendien dragen onze producten niet alleen bij aan het verminderen van de CO2-uitstoot, ze zijn ook van topkwaliteit. Elk apparaat ondergaat een grondige testprocedure dankzij onze tech-helden, waardoor we premium kwaliteit kunnen garanderen met meer dan 50 punten van zorgvuldige inspectie.

Bij RefurbCity willen we duurzaam smartphonegebruik voor iedereen toegankelijk maken. Sluit je aan bij ons en maak een positieve impact op het milieu zonder in te leveren op kwaliteit. Laten we samen de wereld groener maken!

Description:
Гагенау е на самиот врв на понудата на кујнска опрема. Со традиција што може да се следи до далечната 1683 год оваа Германска компанија нуди рачни изработени кујнски апарати со ненадминлив квалитет и трајност.

Рачна изработка
После повеќе од 300 години сеуште поголем дел од производите се правени рачно, од почетното обликување на челикот, до склопувањето на електричните контроли.

Принципи од професионалните кујни
Нашите кујни се организирани со една цел, да му служат на шефот. Функцијата е се.

Квалитет во се
Се што се прави во Гаггенау е далеку над нормата. Од изборот на вработени, материјалите што се користат до ригорозната контрола на квалитет. Нема штедење.

Посетете ја вебстраната на Гагенау за повеќе информации

Name: Penta Gruppo
Description:
Penta Gruppo is a company specializing in the sale of weighing systems. The company's main product groups are ATEX scales, mobile weighing, weighbridges, industrial scales, platforms, weight indicators and load cells. Penta Gruppo boasts many years of experience in the area of weighing, batching and industrial automation. The company offers state of the art technology, which guarantees the highest levels of precision, keeping to international standards.

Name: EPOCH BATTERIES
Description:
Our first company, 18650BatteryStore, was founded in 2013 with the goal of providing a reliable and trustworthy supply of 18650 lithium-ion cells to the North American market. After personally encountering difficulties sourcing genuine cells and encountering fake cells on various online platforms, we decided to take matters into our own hands. Through in-house testing and establishing manufacturer to distributor supply chains with full traceability, we were able to provide consumers with genuine cells and eliminate the potential dangers associated with fake cells. Today, we are proud to work with reputable companies such as NASA, Space X, Raytheon, and Lockheed Martin.

Building on the success of 18650BatteryStore, we founded Epoch Batteries in 2019. We recognized that the energy storage market was similarly plagued by bad actors, poorly crafted products, and misinformation. With the ease of access to third-party distribution warehouses, foreign companies can now operate in the USA with little accountability for the quality and safety of their products. Epoch Batteries was established to provide honest, high-quality lithium solutions across a range of energy storage applications, from marine batteries to golf carts and RV/Van energy storage. By leveraging our over a decade of experience in the lithium industry, we are able to offer truly exceptional products that we proudly stand behind.

Name: Ekobom Group
Description:
Ekobom Group - Ekobom, Franke, Bompani, Tecnogas kimi Avropanın tanınmış premium mətbəx avadanlıqları markalarının Azərbaycandakı təmsilçisidir, ölkədə bu sahədə ixtisaslaşmış aparıcı distribyutorlardan biridir. Şirkət müştərilərinə müasir texnologiya, yüksək keyfiyyət və Avropa mətbəx mədəniyyətini birləşdirən funksional və estetik həllər təqdim etməyi hədəfləyir.

Ekobom — 2008-ci ildə İtaliyanın Modena şəhərində təsis edilmiş premium mətbəx avadanlıqları brendidir. “Luxury is Accessible” (Lüks əlçatan ola bilər) fəlsəfəsi ilə fəaliyyət göstərən Ekobom, innovativ texnologiya və zərif İtalyan dizaynını birləşdirərək soba, soyuducu, mikrodalğa, hava təmizləyici, qabyuyan, paltaryuyan, kran və mətbəx lavaboları kimi geniş məhsul çeşidini təqdim edir.

Franke — 1911-ci ildə İsveçrədə qurulmuş, dünya miqyasında məşhur mətbəx avadanlıqları və inteqrasiya olunmuş həllər istehsalçısıdır. Franke məhsulları keyfiyyət, davamlılıq və estetik baxımdan yüksək standartları ilə fərqlənir, müasir mətbəxlər üçün ideal seçimdir.

Bompani — 1954-cü ildən fəaliyyət göstərən, İtaliyanın ikonik məişət texnikası brendidir. Bompani, rəngli və cəsarətli dizaynları ilə seçilir və klassik İtalyan üslubunu müasir texnologiya ilə ustalıqla birləşdirir.

Tecnogas — 1952-ci ildən İtaliyada fəaliyyət göstərən, peşəkar performans və dayanıqlı texnologiyaya fokuslanan premium mətbəx avadanlıqları markasıdır. Tecnogas, xüsusilə aşpazlar və kulinariya həvəskarları üçün yüksək performanslı həllər təklif edir.

Ekobom Group olaraq, məqsədimiz Azərbaycan müştərilərinə yalnız avadanlıq təqdim etmək deyil, həm də Avropa mətbəx mədəniyyətini, dizayn fəlsəfəsini və funksional üstünlükləri bir araya gətirməkdir. 

Şirkət həm B2B, həm də B2C müştərilərə xidmət göstərərək, geniş satış kanallarına malikdir. Satdığı bütün məhsullara rəsmi zəmanət təqdim etməklə, müştərilərə etibarlı və keyfiyyətli xidmət təmin edir.

Name: Walnut Medical Private Limited
Description:
Walnut Medical is an end-to-end OEM/ODM specializing in neuro-rehabilitation devices, robotic gait training systems, FES therapy equipment, medical electronics, and payment soundbox hardware. With complete in-house design, R&D, prototyping, electronics engineering, PCB layout, firmware development, mechanical design, and large-scale manufacturing, we provide turnkey product solutions from concept to mass production.

Backed by our embedded engineering team, SMT lines, molding and fabrication units, quality testing, calibration labs, and assembly infrastructure, we ensure high-performance, clinically compliant and reliable devices built for Indian and global deployment.

Our flagship solutions for hospitals and rehabilitation centers include the WalkLab robotic gait rehabilitation system and WalkEx functional electrical stimulation device, enabling task-oriented neuro-rehab for stroke, spinal cord injury, traumatic brain injury, cerebral palsy and mobility impairments. We support advanced rehabilitation units, physiotherapy departments, neurology, orthopedics, and PMR medicine through standardized therapy, gait training, balance correction, and measurable patient outcomes.

For the fintech ecosystem, we serve as a strategic partner in payment soundbox ODM, secure hardware design, acoustic tuning, IoT devices, wireless connectivity, battery management, cloud integration, and enterprise customization — supporting banks, PSPs, payment aggregators and consumer electronics brands.

Driven by innovation, scalable engineering, and indigenous manufacturing, Walnut Medical delivers hospital-grade medical equipment, healthcare technology, and smart electronic devices built for durability, safety, and large-volume production.

Name: ENERSHOP SAS Materiales Electricos
Description:
Sobre Enershop
Enershop Materiales Eléctricos y Servicios con base en Maipú, Mendoza, es una casa de insumos eléctricos con trayectoria local, orientada a brindar soluciones integrales a industrias, empresas, instaladores y particulares. Su distintivo: asesoramiento personalizado y productos de alta calidad.

Nuestros principales servicios
1. Distribución de materiales eléctricos
Suministramos una amplia gama de productos eléctricos de baja y media tensión: cables cobre y aluminio, caños, disyuntores, termomagnéticos, contactores y líneas de iluminación (LED, industrial, vial). Perfectos tanto para viviendas como para proyectos industriales.
2. Iluminación técnica y comercial
Asesoramos en la elección de soluciones LED eficientes y duraderas: diseñamos proyectos de iluminación para naves industriales, oficinas, depósitos o comercios. También acompañamos en la optimización del consumo energético basado en normativa vigente.
3. Soporte técnico especializado
Incluye asistencia personalizada: recomendaciones de producto según normativa, asesoramiento para dimensionar instalaciones y troubleshooting de sistemas eléctricamente complejos—antes y después de la compra.
4. Proyectos y soluciones integradas
Colaboramos en la planificación o abastecimiento de obras completas: desde el cableado hasta tableros y equipos técnicos. Ideal para empresas o instaladores que buscan gestión unificada en materiales y servicio.

¿Por qué elegirnos?
Atención personalizada y acompañamiento técnico desde el presupuesto hasta el servicio postventa.
Stock confiable local, con envíos ágiles y contacto directo para asistencia rápida.
Compromiso con calidad y seguridad, operando bajo estándares profesionales y normativos de la industria eléctrica.
Vinculación local: fortalecidos por la comunidad mendocina, con foco regional y proximidad geográfica en cada servicio.
Primary Industry: Retail Appliances, Electrical, and Electronic Equipment

Name: Retravision
Description:
For 60 years, Retravision has been serving local communities, offering up the latest technology from the world’s best brands with a smile.

From humble beginnings in 1961 it has grown to become one of Australia’s leading electrical appliance retailers, now boasting 20 privately owned stores across the country and an easy-to-use online store. Over the course of the last six decades, Retravision has been at the forefront of many innovations, going from strength to strength even as the world moved from black and white to colour TV, Hi-Fi to Wi-Fi and cash to cashless.

In that time, the one thing that has never changed is Retravision’s commitment to great service. Key to its success is the entrepreneurial spirit of Retravision’s owner-operators, backed up by professional management at State and National level.

Retravision has always prided itself on the knowledge and experience offered by dedicated and well trained staff in each of its stores. The complexity and range of electrical products available on the market may have increased, but Retravision’s great service and advice has never wavered.

Consumers can shop confidently knowing that Retravision’s Company Charter has always been about “Going the Extra Mile”. This means, service is everything and Retravision aims to ensure ALL aspects of your experience are the best they can be, from getting the best advice, to shopping the best brands at the best price.

Whilst a lot may have changed over the years, there’s undoubtedly still a lot more in store for Retravision!

Šis naujas vardas įkūnija ne tik mūsų patirtį, modernų 24 parduotuvių tinklą visoje Lietuvoje, bet ir visiškai naują parduotuvių koncepciją, kursiančią mūsų klientui dar geresnę apsipirkimo patirtį - jausitės ne tik patogiai, bet ir jaukiai – kaip namuose.
„Elesen“ bus dar arčiau savo klientų, todėl stengsimės geriausiai suprasti pirkėjų poreikius ir pasiūlyti sprendimus, kurie palengvins kiekvieno kasdienybę. Kiekviename žingsnyje sieksime aukščiausios kokybės – nuo kruopščiai atrinkto asortimento ir profesionalaus aptarnavimo iki papildomų paslaugų, tokių kaip kaip įrangos pristatymo, montavimo bei senos technikos utilizavimo.
„Elesen“ – drauge lengviau.

Name: Moon Audio
Description:
Think of your favorite song, the one that moves you like nothing else can. Now imagine that it sounds more expressive, more nuanced, more like a front-row seat to a live performance. Maybe it's a catch in the singer's breath, the subtle scratch of a guitar string, or the scintillating sizzle of a cymbal. The magic of music lives in its power to stir your emotions, so we created Dragon Audio Cables to bring you a more immersive, dynamic, and detailed listening experience.

For many headphone manufacturers, cables can be an afterthought — a means to an end. The problem is, poorly made cables can create a bottleneck for sound. Lower-quality materials, thin conductors, and bad geometries can deteriorate the signal transfer, so your music — like cars slowed by a rush-hour traffic jam — won't have a clean, clear path from your audio source to your ears. At Moon Audio, quality, handcrafted audio cables are our obsession, our passion, and our livelihood. We know that materials matter, so we build our cables to order using 99.99998% pure UP-OCC copper and silver conductors with premium connectors for more clarity, detail, and musicality from your favorite headphones and other audio gear.

Our Silver, Black, Blue, and Bronze Dragon Cables are coveted by musicians, audiophiles, and music lovers around the world. Dragon Cables shorten the distance from concert halls and recording studios to your ears, so that you hear recordings the way your favorite artists intended. We've built Moon Audio around our deep passion for music and hi-fi, and a dedication to delivering a more immersive, realistic, and joyful listening experience. If you want to rediscover your collection and get closer to your music, we invite you to swap out your stock audio cables and discover the Dragon Cable difference.

Name: Senic
Description:
Senic is a hardware and software company based in Berlin, dedicated to exploring and designing new ways for humans to interact with technology. Senic products look to make user experiences seamless and natural and go beyond limited screen-based UI. 

Senic crowdfunded their first product in an entire line of interfaces, smart surfaces and objects in 2015. Nuimo Control is an intuitive controller for your Sonos speakers, Philips Hue lights and more. No scrolling through menus, digging through apps or getting distracted by notifications. Just instant control with an easy setup that works.

In October 2018, Senic released Nuimo Click: a wireless switch that gives everyone at home simple, one-click smart home control. Nuimo Click uses energy harvesting technology which generates enough energy each time you press it to send a wireless signal to the Nuimo Hub. This means it never needs to charge – ever.  

All Senic products are designed and manufactured in Germany. At Senic, the focus is not just technology – the focus is people, and how they can benefit from these technologies.

Mit dem Motto „Besonderes ist unser Standard“ stehen Qualität, Kundenservice und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen im Fokus.

Unsere Produkte:
•	Industrie-Stromversorgungen: Präzise und leistungsstarke Lösungen für Prüffelder, Labors und Entwicklungsanwendungen – von Standardprodukten bis zu individuellen Anpassungen.

Name: PT Electronic City Indonesia Tbk
Description:
PT Electronic City Indonesia Tbk. (“Electronic City”) merupakan salah satu dari pelopor perusahaan ritel produk elektronik modern di Indonesia. Berdiri sejak tahun 2001 dan membuka toko standalone sekaligus toko pertama (flagship store) di Sudirman Central Business District (SCBD). Electronic City memperluas jaringan toko di luar Jabodetabek dengan membuka toko pertama di Denpasar di tahun 2004 dan di Sumatera yang terletak di Medan, Sumatera Utara di tahun 2007.

Electronic City resmi menjadi perusahaan terbuka pada tanggal 3 Juli 2013 dan tercatat di PT Bursa Efek Indonesia (kode saham ECII). Electronic City melepas 333.333.000 saham atau sebanyak 25% dari modal ditempatkan dan disetor penuh setelah penawaran umum dengan harga penawaran Rp 4.050 per saham.

Sampai dengan Desember 2021, Electronic City telah mengoperasikan 62 toko yang tersebar di beberapa kota besar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera, dan Sulawesi. Electronic City menawarkan produk yang beragam dalam empat kategori utama yaitu: audio-video, peralatan rumah tangga, IT dan telepon selular dan kamera dan peralatan kantor. Dalam menjalankan kegiatan operasionalnya Electronic City juga didukung oleh 11 gudang distribusi yang berada di Jakarta, Tangerang, Bogor, Bandung, Magelang, Medan, Lampung, Batam, Makassar, Palembang, dan Kendari.

Electronic City juga meluncurkan platform e-commerce yaitu www.eci.id melalui situs resmi Perseroan dalam upaya untuk memperkuat citra Perseroan dan menjaring konsumen yang lebih memilih untuk membeli produk secara online.

Name: RoboGem
Description:
RoboGem is more than a technology brand. It is a tribute, a vision, and a promise rooted in care and innovation.

Our journey began during a time of profound loss, following the passing of a beloved colleague — our “work mum” — during the Covid-19 pandemic. In her memory, we set out to create something meaningful that would reflect her spirit of compassion, resilience, and the joy she brought to others. RoboGem was founded to honour her legacy, her brilliance, and her unwavering warmth.

What started as a tribute quickly evolved into a mission: to deliver smart home technology that makes everyday life easier, more efficient, and more joyful. Today, RoboGem is a proudly South African tech company offering innovative products such as robotic vacuum cleaners, carpet washers, and portable screen monitors. Each product is designed to enhance modern living through practical functionality, thoughtful design, and reliable performance.

We believe that technology should serve people. It should simplify tasks, create more time for what matters, and bring meaningful improvements to daily life. That is why we are committed to developing smart devices that combine quality, convenience, and innovation.

This is just the beginning. At RoboGem, we are constantly exploring new ideas and pushing the boundaries of what home technology can do. Our focus remains on creating products that make a difference — honouring the past while shaping a smarter, more connected future.

Thank you for being part of our journey. With heart, vision, and purpose, we continue to move forward.

Who We Are
Having started with its core business in industrial electronic equipment supply, DELTRIC Sdn Bhd was established in year 1996. The trend of global electronic manufacturers shifting plants continuously among developing countries then, has urged DELTRIC to undergo business transformation.

SETTING THE PACE FOR SUCCESS

With successful business relationship with leading manufacturers, DELTRIC is able to offer a full range of cables and complete electrical construction material meeting International industrial specifications including IEC, VDE, BS, DIN, JIS and others.

Due to business requirement, an important team to handle logistics management for the complete supply has been established. DELTRIC takes the business requirement of the customer seriously and have dedicated team assigned to ensure FAT activities and delivery dates are materialized in a timely manner.

With business nature primarily in retailing and stocking of electrical construction material, DELTRIC is able to fulfill customer requirement faster and more efficiently.


OUR AIM
With a committed workforce, qualified personnel and competitive pricing, DELTRIC has the vision to become the preferred one stop supplier to our customers in industrial markets. We specialize in the sale, installation, and maintenance of solar systems, leveraging our extensive experience and expertise in the electronic solutions industry. O que é a sua cultura, a nossa cultura, a cultura de cada um? Cultura pode significar muitas coisas, mas passa pelo nosso modo de vida, o que escolhemos ler, comer, consumir, vivenciar. Hoje a tecnologia faz parte de nossa cultura, de modo que quase todos os nossos atos a utilizam como meio e, porque não, como fim. A cultura tecnológica é inerente ao ser humano atual a ponto de apregoarem o surgimento do homo technologicus. No entanto, nós sabemos que, no fundo, ainda somos os mesmos sapiens. Os mesmos que ainda sentem prazer em olhar um céu estrelado ou pisar descalço na grama. Os mesmos que não querem desperdiçar seu tempo com soluções de má qualidade ou inadequadas, mas ver as coisas fluírem para aproveitar o que é realmente essencial. Nós da Cultural Tech, temos a missão de trazer tecnologia de qualidade que te integre à sua cultura e te permita ampliar as sua opções no seu dia-a-dia.
We Live Tech!

Name: Dhaka Robotics
Description:
"Dhaka Robotics" or www.dhakarobotics.com is a subsidiary of GEO SPACE BD, originally founded as a Civil Testing Engineering Solution with a primary focus on soil testing. GEO SPACE BD also engages in the construction business, serving as a key financial resource for the company.

In its recent endeavors, GEO SPACE BD has expanded its scope to include the manufacturing and assembly of automated civil testing devices. A notable achievement is the successful research and development of the RCPT (Rapid Chloride Permeability Test) machine, complemented by the creation of unique software.

"Dhaka Robotics" was established to ensure a sustainable source of funding for ongoing research and development activities. It aims to foster partnerships with government entities, private organizations, and local institutions. The primary clientele includes students, educators, local hobbyists, and institutions seeking tenders.

Simultaneously, "Dhaka Robotics" actively collaborates with various stakeholders to organize robotics competitions and workshops, contributing to the establishment of a prominent brand presence locally. Additionally, the company offers a wide range of electronic, electrical, and robotics products at highly competitive prices, making them accessible to a broad user base.

Vi tilbyr et bredt utvalg av kommunikasjonsradioer innen VHF, UHF, DMR og PoC (Push-to-Talk over mobilnett), fra anerkjente produsenter som Hytera, Motorola, Inrico, Zodiac og Icom. Løsningene tilpasses alt fra enkle arbeidslag til komplekse sambandsoppsett med basestasjoner, repeatere og dekning over store områder.

Innen hørselvern og kommunikasjon leverer vi komplette løsninger fra 3M Peltor, inkludert WS- og LiteCom-seriene, tilpasset krevende arbeidsmiljøer. Vi tilbyr også mikrofoner, PTT-løsninger, hjelmintegrasjon og tilbehør for optimal komfort og sikkerhet.

I tillegg leverer vi tilbehør og støtteutstyr som batterier, ladere, antenner, hodesett, skallebensmikrofoner, bæreløsninger og spesialkabler. For områder uten stabil dekning tilbyr vi også satellittbaserte løsninger, inkludert Starlink og Iridium, for sikker kommunikasjon og datatilgang.

Lyd og Tele kombinerer produkter med fagkompetanse, programmering, installasjon, service og support, slik at kundene får driftssikre løsninger tilpasset sitt behov – både i hverdagen og når det virkelig gjelder.

Our low smoke zero halogen conduit systems prevent incidents that are associated with fires when they occur in buildings, tunnels and other structures. In the case of an incident involving fire, 4site conduit systems will not release any thick black smoke filled with harmful, toxic or corrosive gases into the atmosphere. This is due to the low smoke emitting technology we employ for our conduit systems, ensuring visibility is maintained allowing easy exit via any escape routes. Choosing to install 4site conduit systems will safeguard your job site and protect those who would one day visit or occupy it.

At 4site Technologies, we understand the importance of reliable and durable conduits for any electrical project. That's why we offer an extensive range of conduit options to suit various applications and environments. Our catalogue includes a wide selection of sizes, materials, and configurations, ensuring that you can find the perfect conduit solution for your specific project requirements.

Name: Bijela Tehnika Hadžići
Description:
Bijela Tehnika Hadžići je počela sa radom 2015. godine kao malo preduzeće sa velikim ambicijama i težnjama za postajanjem konkurentnog i prepoznatljivog imena u svijetu bijele tehnike. Kroz godine smo napornim radom i velikim ulaganjem unaprijedili posao, te sada naša kompanija broji 40 uposlenika sa odličnim vještinama u prodaji. Naša radnja smještena je u Industrijskoj zoni Garovci u Hadžićima, Bosna i Hercegovina, te se ponosimo širokim asortimanom uređaja, uključujući frižidere, veš mašine, perilice posuđa, pećnice, usisavače, kuhinjske aparate, klima uređaje, laptope i mnoge druge.
Kao ekskluzivni prodavač TCL proizvoda, Bijela Tehnika Hadžići predstavlja najnovije i najinovativnije tehnologije koje TCL nudi. Takođe smo ekskluzivni uvoznici i distributeri Brenda FRAM  koji je doživio veliki uspjeh na našem tržištu.

2024. godine smo lansirali platofrmu MONTAŽA.BA koja pruža jednostavne usluge montaže klima uređaja, kao i servisiranje bijele tehnike. Platforma Montaža.ba pruža korisnicima sigurnost i povjerenje u kvalitetu usluge, dok istovremeno serviserima omogućava pristup većem broju klijenata i alate za organizaciju posla. Kroz integraciju različitih funkcionalnosti poput ocjenjivanja servisera kroz recenzije, jasnog prikaza kvalifikacija i iskustava servisera, kao i alata za upravljanje poslovanjem poput kalendara i fakturisanja, Montaža.ba će revolucionarno utjecati na način obavljanja usluga montaže i servisiranja klima i bijele tehnike u Bosni i Hercegovini. 
Svjesni koliko je odabir kućanskih aparata važan za svakodnevni život, Bijela tehnika Hadžići nudi kvalitetne proizvode, uslugu bez premca i najbolje cijene. Želimo da naši kupci donesu informirane odluke pri kupovini, stoga smo ovdje kako bismo vam pružili sve potrebne informacije i podršku. Vaša satisfakcija naš je prioritet, stoga nas posjetite na našoj adresi Hadžići, Industrijska zona 5 ili na našem web shopu www.bijelatehnika.com.

Name: Ozonify Home
Description:
En Ozonify impulsamos una nueva forma de cuidar el hogar, la salud y el planeta. Nuestro equipo convierte el agua de red en agua ozonizada ilimitada para limpiar, desinfectar, desengrasar y desodorizar sin químicos. Sustituye productos de limpieza tradicionales, protege a las personas, reduce residuos y ahorra dinero.

El agua ozonizada es una tecnología poderosa y segura que destruye virus, bacterias y gérmenes por lisis celular. Ideal para lavar ropa, superficies, pisos, baños, cocinas, frutas y más. Al poco tiempo se descompone y vuelve a ser agua común, sin dejar tóxicos ni contaminar.

Nuestro compromiso es acercar innovación accesible y práctica a familias y negocios, con foco en el bienestar, el ahorro y el impacto ambiental positivo. Ozonify no requiere mantenimiento, tiene un único consumible que rinde 500.000 litros y su instalación es muy simple: en Montevideo la hacemos nosotros, en el resto del país guiamos remotamente al usuario o a su sanitario de confianza.

Además, desarrollamos y representamos soluciones en ozono en aire y nanotecnología para superficies textiles, apuntando a un estilo de vida más sustentable, seguro y eficiente.

Name: MDP Group (PT. Multi Data Palembang)
Description:
Didirikan pada tahun 1987 sebagai pusat kursus komputer pionir di Sumatera Selatan, MDP Group atau PT. Multi Data Palembang (MDP) telah berkembang menjadi pemimpin regional di bidang pendidikan, teknologi informasi, dan ritel konsumen. Memulai ekspansi ke sektor ritel pada 1990, MDP meluncurkan MDP Superstore pada 2011 — destinasi belanja teknologi terintegrasi satu atap terbesar di Palembang. Berlokasi strategis di jantung kota, Jl. Jend. Sudirman, MDP Superstore menjadi peritel resmi utama untuk merek-merek global IT dan elektronik terkemuka.

Pada 2024, MDP menghadirkan MDP Plaza, pusat gaya hidup modern lima lantai yang memadukan teknologi, fesyen, dan kuliner, menciptakan ikon baru untuk pusat kota Palembang.

Saat ini, MDP beroperasi di ritel, distribusi, e-commerce, dan pengadaan pemerintah melalui platform seperti E-katalog LKPP, PaDi UMKM, dan SIPLAH. Dengan komitmen pada inovasi, pengalaman pelanggan, dan keunggulan operasional, MDP terus memperkuat posisinya sebagai motor penggerak kemajuan industri dan gaya hidup di Sumatera Selatan.

Name: Brother България
Description:
Официален профил на Brother България. Като производител и доставчик на широк спектър от принтери, скенери, етикетни принтери и бизнес решения, ние заставаме на страната на нашите клиенти и се стремим да им предложим висококачествени устройства, които най-точно отговарят на специфичните нужди на техния офис. 
Brother България е част от глобалната група Brother, която вече повече от 100 години е пионер в иновациите. Екипът на българския офис развива пазара в Албания, Сърбия, Република Северна Македония и Косово. Продуктите и услугите ни са предназначени да стимулират ефективността, да повишат производителността и да насърчат сътрудничеството на работното място. Ние „разрастваме себе си чрез израстване на другите“, като помагаме на компаниите да постигат изключителни резултати. На база на дългогодишния ни опит с бизнеси от различен мащаб – от еднолични търговци до големи корпорации с хиляди служители, както и представители от държавния и обществения сектор, се адаптираме непрекъснато спрямо менящите се изисквания на нашите клиенти. 
В корпоративната философия на нашата компания е заложен непрекъснат стремеж към постигане на устойчиво развитие и производство, като полагаме непрекъснати усилия да намаляваме въглеродния отпечатък от нашата дейност, да опазваме планетата и да подкрепяме хората чрез всичко, което правим.

Name: Fritz-Events
Description:
Fritz-Events is al ruim 20 jaar dé specialist op het gebied van (semi-)professionele licht- en geluidsproducten. Van luidsprekers, microfoons en mixers tot dj-draaitafels, DMX-lichtcontrollers en confettikanonnen, tot flightcases, statieven en bekabeling: je vindt het allemaal in onze webshop. Onze winkel met showroom is 6 dagen per week geopend en is gevestigd op Hulsbos 7 in Cuijk, vlakbij Nijmegen. Hier krijg je de mogelijkheid om onze producten werkend te zien en zelf uit te testen.

Of jij je vragen nu stelt in onze winkel, telefonisch of online, wij hechten te allen tijde veel waarde aan persoonlijke service en geven vakkundig en eerlijk advies. Dat blijkt wel uit de vele dagelijkse positieve reviews van onze klanten, die onder andere bestaan uit dj's, muzikanten, theaters en bedrijven.

Het jonge en enthousiaste team van Fritz-Events houdt de webshop en winkel vol passie draaiende en samen verzetten wij bergen. We hanteren een informele werksfeer, waarin collega's zich thuis voelen en er ruimte is voor humor en luchtige gesprekken. Middagpauze houden we dagelijks gezamenlijk in onze kantine, zodat we ook eens goed kunnen bijkletsen met collega's van andere afdelingen. En niet te vergeten: eens per jaar trekken we alles uit de kast voor een knallend teamuitje en een uitgebreide kerstlunch!

Name: Studio 22- Alta Fidelidad y Cine en Casa (Audio Impulse S.L.)
Description:
Studio 22 es una empresa dedicada a la venta de equipos de Alta Fidelidad y Cine en Casa ubicada en C/ Colombia, 22 28016 Madrid.

Desde 1.981, Studio 22 es uno de los mejores establecimientos más veteranos y especializados de España en cuanto a la reproducción musical y audiovisual se refiere. En nuestra tienda física disponemos 6 salas de demostración: 3 de Alta Fidelidad y 3 de Cine en Casa, donde los clientes podrán probar multitud de productos para ayudarles en su decisión final de compra.

Studio 22 nació en 1981 como un establecimiento especializado en Alta Fidelidad y ofrece desde sus orígenes una completa gama de equipos a todos los niveles para todos los melómanos aficionados a este mundo. Podrá disponer desde asequibles soluciones para disfrutar de la música, hasta los equipos High End más sofisticados y que el cliente pueda imaginar.

También fuimos pioneros en la venta e instalación de equipos de Cine en Casa. Bajo esta denominación se conoce a toda la tecnología concebida para que en su hogar pueda experimentar, y a veces superar, las sensaciones ofrecidas por una sala de cine. Ni se puede imaginar cómo podrá disfrutar no solo usted, sino toda su familia, al visionar películas en su hogar utilizando el equipamiento adecuado.

Por supuesto, igualmente podemos trabajar en conjunto con arquitectos, interioristas, diseñadores e integradores para poder ofrecerles las mejores soluciones en audio y vídeo para el hogar de sus clientes. Contamos con el mayor stock de España siendo el único establecimiento especializado del país con naves logísticas en propiedad para garantizar el mejor suministro a los clientes.
