Name: PMT FRANCE
Description:
La société PMT France, créée en 1999, a pour vocation la vente, le service et la maintenance d’instruments de mesures et de solutions associés aux particules, microorganismes et contaminations électrostatiques.
 
L’activité de la société concerne principalement les secteurs industriels suivants : 

-	Pharmaceutique 
-	Cosmétique
-	Électronique 
-	Santé 
-	Agroalimentaire 
-	Télécommunications 
-	Aérospatial 
-	Environnement, Recherche 

PMT France a son siège et son centre de Service Technique basés à Dourdan (Essonne). 
L’entreprise est membre d’un groupe de sociétés associées et liées entre elles, présentent en Angleterre, Irlande, Belgique, Hollande, Luxembourg, Allemagne, Suisse et aux USA ; toutes dédiées au contrôle de la contamination.

Notre activité : 

Distribution de matériel scientifique, vente et service après-vente. 
Contrats de maintenance, calibration pour tout compteur de particules et pour l’ensemble des équipements commercialisés
Formations sur site et location de matériel 
Conception, installation et qualification de systèmes de monitoring particulaire

Nos produits 

Large gamme de compteurs de particules dans l’air  
Compteur de particules viables en temps réel 
Logiciel de monitoring environnemental 
Compteur de particules viables en temps réel pour l’eau 
Compteurs de particules surfacique
Systèmes pour tests d'intégrité des filtres 
Matériels et équipements d’ionisation 
Bio collecteurs d’air avec têtes d’impaction déportées, tête Slit-To-Agar et tête pour gaz comprimés 

Prestations et Services

PMT France est certifiée ISO9001 version 2015. 
La structure dispose d’un département Service Technique conçu pour répondre aux besoins et recommandations des clients. Un investissement continu est fait afin d’assurer un développement du service au client. Une équipe formée et qualifiée et des procédures éprouvées permettent d’assurer et de maintenir un service de qualité.

Name: APPLiA Hungary
Description:
APPLiA Hungary represents the home appliance industry in Hungary.

APPLiA was founded as the European Association of National Associations in 1958. Over the past 50 years it has undergone a number of transformations to become even more effective. A permanent Brussels office was established in 1997 to better represent its members vis-à-vis the European Communities institutions. Direct membership for individual household appliance companies was also introduced that year.

APPLiA Direct Member companies produce the following products:

- large household appliances (including refrigerators & freezers, dishwashers, washing machines, clothes dryers, ovens, hoods);
- small household appliances (covering a wide range of products from shavers to vacuum cleaners);
- heating, ventilation, and air conditioning equipment, mainly for residential use.

APPLiA represents an innovative industry. Examples of current areas of innovation are interactivity with electronic communication technology and improving performance while reducing power and, where relevant, water consumption. APPLiA's successful Energy & Environment projects shows how reduced environmental impact can be coupled to enhanced product performance.

Name: Shop easy dubai
Description:
What is eCommerce online shopping?
eCommerce, aka online shopping, is a form of electronic commerce which allows consumers to buy goods or services directly from a seller over the Internet using a web browser.

What is eCommerce and its advantages?
Online shopping is the sale and purchase of services and goods over the Internet. It’s convenient, available 24/7, searchable, global (wide customer reach), cost-effective for sellers and customers, and doesn’t require much (if any) physical space.

eCommerce for Trust And Security
First and foremost, it is important to design a website that shoppers feel they can trust. Most shoppers are concerned about privacy and whether the site will protect their personal data by providing a secure transaction. If the website does not feel trustworthy, they will simply choose to shop elsewhere.

eCommerce Design Considerations
The look and feel of a website is the main driver of first impressions. Research concludes that people will determine whether they like a website or not in just 50 milliseconds.

Online shoppers expect frictionless experiences no matter what. When designing an eCommerce site, it is not just about building a website but creating an online shopping experience that will convert passive shoppers into paying customers.

Name: GRG Energy & Lighting
Description:
En GRG Energy & Lighting integramos iluminación arquitectónica y gestión energética para crear espacios bellos, seguros y eficientes.

Unimos diseño, ingeniería y control para entregar resultados medibles en lux, kWh y OPEX, desde el concepto hasta la operación.

 A quién servimos
Arquitectos, interioristas, desarrolladores, constructores, facility managers y equipos de operación que buscan precisión estética, eficiencia y cumplimiento regulatorio.

 Qué hacemos
 Diseño y simulación luminotécnica (uniformidad, CRI, UGR, confort visual).
 Suministro: tiras LED de alta especificación, perfiles, drivers y luminarias arquitectónicas.
 Control e integración: DALI / 0–10V / DMX, sensores y escenas, interoperable con BMS.
 Gestión de energía: auditorías, M&V, optimización de consumo y planeación CAPEX/OPEX.

 Energía solar y almacenamiento
 Ingeniería fotovoltaica integral: estudio de sitio, irradiación y sombras; orientación (azimut) e inclinación óptimas; definición de ubicación y estructura (carga, viento, corrosión).
 Selección y configuración: módulos y strings, inversores de alta tecnología (string/central/micro, MPPT avanzado, anti-islanding) y monitoreo en tiempo real.
 BESS / baterías: dimensionamiento para respaldo, peak shaving, time-of-use y continuidad operativa.
 Interconexión y retorno a la red: trámites, memorias técnicas y protecciones para conexión con la red gubernamental; medición/facturación neta cuando aplica.

 Nuestra diferencia
Cada lumen y cada watt responden a una intención: elevar la experiencia espacial y optimizar la energía con datos. Medimos, modelamos y documentamos para que el desempeño estético y operativo sea verificable y sostenible.

 Sectores
Industria • Corporativo • Hospitalidad • Museografía • Centros de datos • Educativo • Residencial • Retail.

 Cobertura
México (B2B y B2C). Proyectos en LATAM bajo evaluación

—

Una empresa de GRG Nexus

We're running a November special which offers you 60% off on the installation price!

How does it work? 
PowerHub is a distribution board that allows you to connect a portable power station (compact inverter-battery) to your home. We recommend high-quality brands like Gizzu Hero or EcoFlow River 2 / Delta 2 that can last for 10 years and also come with 2-5 year warranty. Overall this enables a backup solution that is super versatile, cost-effective and rental friendly (Because we make use of a portable unit it can plug in or out without an electrician's help. Check out our website for our helpful calculator tool that can you figure out exactly what your needs are.
You can then get an instant price estimate and a quote.

Name: Top Choice - Electronics & Appliances
Description:
Top Choice has a deep-rooted history and it all started with Charles & Theresa Tabone founding their company back in 1967. The couple started their business venture by opening an ironmongery in Hamrun. Soon after, they acquired their second establishment and started specializing in home décor and crockery.

In the mid-1980s, Charles and Theresa retired, and their son Robert took over the family business. Tabone re-structured the company’s branding and established the company name – Top Choice. During these times, the business expanded and started importing appliances, Hi-Fi equipment, and televisions. In fact, Top Choice was amongst the first television importers in Malta.

By 2002, Top Choice had built a strong market presence and enlarged their Hamrun outlet by 1000sqm. In 2010, the company opened its second retail outlet in Żabbar and eight years later invested in its third outlet in St Paul’s Bay. Along with these achievements, Top Choice started representing several renowned brands such as LG, Ariston, Sharp, Toshiba, and many others.

Nowadays, Top Choice is one of Malta’s leading consumer electronics and home appliances retailers and is continuously expanding by creating a more engaging customer experience.

Name: Airobor
Description:
Airobor, Top 1 Smartwatches for couples in the USA,is an American smartwatches brand based in Los Angeles.  Airobor is a brand that was founded with a mission to help people leave time for the ones they love. Our vision is to create a world where people can stay connected with the world while also spending quality time with their loved ones. With the fast-paced nature of modern life, it can be easy to get caught up in technology and forget about what's truly important. That's why Airobor was created, to help people balance their use of technology and their relationships.



The founder of Airobor, Josiah Nathaniel, was inspired to start the company after observing the negative impact that technology was having on people's relationships. He realized that people were spending more time on their phones and less time with the people they care about. Josiah wanted to find a solution to this problem, and that's how Airobor was born.

Our main product, the Airobor Smartwatch, is designed to help people stay connected with the world while also leaving time for the people they love. The smartwatch allows you to stay updated with the news, receive notifications, and access important information without constantly reaching for your phone. With its stylish design and functional features, the Airobor Smartwatch is the perfect choice for anyone who wants to balance their use of technology and their relationships.

At Airobor, we understand that a smartwatch is more than just a piece of technology. It's a symbol of love and connection between partners. That's why we offer a range of smartwatches that are specifically designed for couples. Our smartwatches come in matching pairs, allowing couples to stay connected with each other no matter where they are. Whether you're at work, on vacation, or just spending a day at home, our smartwatches are the perfect way to stay connected with the one you love.

Name: SV-Audio
Description:
Sound That Matters.

That’s more than just our motto — it’s the foundation of everything we do at SV-Audio by Storgaard & Vestskov. 

After years of chasing a truly authentic listening experience, we founded our company to bring emotion back into music — by delivering pure, detailed, and highly dynamic sound into people's homes. Our sound philosophy is rooted in super-neutral reproduction that remains rich in soul and nuance. We believe in music as it was meant to be heard.

For me, Kim, it all started in my youth, building loudspeakers in pursuit of hearing recordings exactly as the musicians intended. That passion turned into 17 years of teaching speaker design, acoustics, and sound reproduction.

For me, Casper, the journey began in 1996 when I spent my very first salary on a loudspeaker system, bought in installments because I simply wouldn’t compromise on sound quality. Since then, I’ve explored countless systems — but nothing felt quite right until we developed Frida, our first loudspeaker model. With Frida, I rediscovered music in a way I didn’t think was possible.

In 2023, we combined our backgrounds in craftsmanship, sound, and design to create SV-Audio— a family-run audio company with production rooted on the island of Bornholm, Denmark.

Every component is built in-house. Every decision is guided by a shared dedication to high-resolution sound and timeless design.

We’re here to build audio experiences that matter.

Every racing simulator we install is backed by our 100% Customer Satisfaction Guarantee, and every accessory we offer is designed to work specifically with your setup. More than entertainment, a Simshop simulation installation mimics a real driving experience, with NEW gen simulators built around REAL direct drive servo motors.

As our partners at Simagic, say: “Going from a sim cockpit to a race car cockpit” has become a common training scenario for many real racers.” 

Simshop is here to make that scenario happen for you. Simshop simulators create an authentic experience - a REAL driving feel achieved by direct drive wheelbases with full metal construction.

When you want to be entertained, Simshop simulators are fully compatible with all major racing simulators / software / games on PC.

Tired of chargers that easily get unplugged or damaged? Meet Permaplug Charger Lock, a patented technology crafted to revolutionize phone charging. With our innovative system, chargers are firmly anchored, ensuring longevity and preventing accidental disconnections. Designed for all, but an absolute game-changer for those in shared spaces, it's the solution to recurring charger replacements and cable wear.

Boasting over 50,000 satisfied customers across the USA, Canada, and Mexico, our hallmark product is renowned as "the last charger you'll ever buy." It features:

Permaplug Outlet Cover: Precision-engineered to lock chargers steadfastly against external forces.

Permaplug Charger: A high-performance 20W fast charger, equipped with both USBC and USBA inputs, seamlessly integrating with our Outlet Cover for a tamper-proof connection.

Permaplug Cables: Reinforced for resilience, these cables are tailored for prolonged use and optimal compatibility.

Permaplug Charger Lock stands as the benchmark in phone charging. Designed for all, especially those in shared spaces, our technology ensures chargers stay anchored and efficient.

Endorsed by platforms like MarketWatch, Fox, Entrepreneur.com, and more, our Dallas, Texas-based brand is firmly rooted in values of safety, transparency, and unmatched customer satisfaction. This commitment is further solidified by our unwavering money-back guarantee. As we expand our global footprint, with patents pending in multiple regions, we remain devoted to elevating your charging experience.

Key Terms: Phone charger lock, charger lock, Permaplug, secure phone charging.

Name: Smart Home - Smart Living
Description:
How can a Smart Home help me?
•	By managing your heating systems, air condition, and lights to be turned on and off at certain conditions (movement, access, temperature, time, etc.) you can reduce your energy bills considerably
•	A Smart Home is an incredible daily help if you have a physical disability. With your voice or a remote control, you can turn on and off your home appliances like lights, cameras, heating, A/C, access control (unlocking/locking doors) etc. without moving around.
•	If you own a holiday home or multiple apartments used for renting, you can easily monitor energy consumption and access control from anywhere. For your own comfort, you can turn on the A/C or heating in advance, so you arrive in a welcoming, warm home.
•	Energy savings to benefit the environment and your finances, by automating electrical appliances like lights and heating to when it is needed
•	Security by monitoring your home while away and automate lights and curtains makes your home look inhabited
•	Make your home even more comfortable by turning all lights on when you arrive home after dark and turn all off when leaving.
•	Create zones in your home to control each room independently
•	Manage all electrical appliances by your voice, your Smart phone, a control panel or even with gestures.
•	Avoid excessive electricity bills (by rentals!) by turning off the air condition, if windows and doors are left open
•	Forgot to turn off the kettle, oven or iron? No problem! You can check and if needed turn it off with your Smart phone while away
•	Use Smart Home for audio and video distribution throughout your home. Turn on relaxing music in the bathrooms or listen to the news in the bedroom in the morning.
Only your creativity decides the possibilities. Basically, everything with an electrical wire can be automated. If you have a special request for automation, do not hesitate to contact Smart Living - We love challenges and will assist you finding the best solution.

Name: Das AquaVita
Description:
Das AquaVita is a Netherlands-based WaterTech company building an AI-powered Water-as-a-Service (WaaS) platform that delivers clean water, real-time intelligence, and circular ecosystem management for homes, institutions, and cities.
Our systems combine AI, IoT sensors, advanced filtration, and electrochemical engineering to monitor water quality in real time — from TDS and microbes to heavy metals and usage patterns. Every device becomes a data node in a decentralized water-intelligence network, enabling predictive maintenance, contamination alerts, and regional water insights.

From smart consumer RO purifiers to institutional stations and city-scale infrastructure, Das AquaVita offers a modular and scalable ecosystem that integrates digital twins, XR engagement, and blockchain-based Digital Product Passports (DPPs) for traceability and circular design.

Headquartered at WaterCampus Leeuwarden, we operate at the intersection of water science and deep tech, supported by global R&D partnerships across Europe, India, Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our roadmap scales from consumer devices (2025–2027) to commercial and institutional deployments (2027–2029), to smart municipal and industrial systems (2029–2032), with a global WaaS and SaaS layer emerging post-2033.

Das AquaVita also leads the Axolotl Conservation & Digital-Twin Habitat Program, using IoT, genomic screening, XR, and citizen science to restore endangered aquatic species and create a blueprint for global aquatic conservation.

Our mission is to deploy 1 million+ smart water nodes by 2030, building a real-time global water-data grid that supports public health, ESG goals, and climate resilience.

Das AquaVita — Know Your Water.

Welcome to InstruIndia!

 Test & Measurement Instruments (TMI)

Our product portfolio includes oscilloscopes, LCR meters, power supplies (AC/DC), multimeters, function generators, and more — sourced from trusted brands .

We aim to simplify technical procurement by offering responsive service, accurate product guidance, and smooth delivery. Whether you're setting up a new lab or expanding existing capabilities, we provide the tools you need to get results.

 MiniLabs – Hands-on STEM Learning Kits
MiniLabs is our in-house educational initiative designed to make science tangible for students in Classes 5–10. Aligned with NCERT curriculum, MiniLabs bridges the gap between textbook theory and real-world understanding using intuitive, hands-on kits — no lab infrastructure required.

Each kit includes structured modules, classroom-ready activity slides, and plug-and-play hardware to help schools bring electronics, circuits, and cause-effect science to life in the classroom. It’s science, made simple — and memorable.

 Whether you're a technical institution in need of precise instruments, or a school looking to spark curiosity through hands-on STEM learning, InstruIndia is here to support your goals with reliable products, modern tools, and practical innovation.

Tầm nhìn (Vision)
Giữ vững vị trí là thương hiệu được ưu tiên hàng đầu trong việc lựa chọn cho phong cách sống mới

Tính cách thương hiệu (Brand Character)
Không ngừng phát triển, đổi mới và đáng tin cậy

Định vị thương hiệu (Brand Positioning)
Chúng tôi là thương hiệu điện tử mới, mang đến sự kết hợp giữa sự thanh lịch và tiện dụng cho cuộc sống hàng ngày của bạn.

Lời hứa thương hiệu (Brand Promise)
Chế tạo các sản phẩm trở nên trang nhã và thiết thực nhằm mang lại niềm vui và sự thỏa mãn tới cuộc sống của mọi người.

Lấy người dùng làm trung tâm, hay “Base on user" là giá trị cốt lõi của thương hiệu, Baseus tự hào đem đến cho người dùng những sản phẩm công nghệ chất lượng cao, độc đáo và tiện dụng. Thương hiệu luôn tập trung tìm hiểu nhu cầu thực tế từ người dùng để cho ra đời các dòng sản phẩm đa dạng từ các thiết bị âm thanh, các thiết bị sạc, đồ gia dụng thông minh tới các dòng phụ kiện ô tô, phụ kiện điện thoại và còn nhiều hơn thế.

Với slogan "Practical. Reliable. Base on User", Baseus cam kết tạo ra những sản phẩm thiết thực và có tính thẩm mỹ cao, trang bị công nghệ tiên tiến nhất với mức giá hợp lý nhằm thoả mãn nhu cầu của khách hàng, mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm sản phẩm tuyệt vời nhất.
Với nỗ lực không ngừng trong việc tạo ra những sản phẩm chất lượng, Baseus đã có bước phát triển thần tốc trong giai đoạn 2018 - 2022 đạt mức tăng trưởng kép hàng năm (CAGR) 45%.

Name: RetinAix
Description:
(Re)tinAix est né d'une évidence.

Depuis la révolution industrielle, l'humain crée toujours mieux, toujours plus vite.
Mais une question s'impose :
Notre planète peut-elle encore suivre le rythme ?

Face à l'obsolescence programmée, nous avons choisi une autre voie :
Redonner vie à des objets iconiques oubliés.

(Re)tinAix reconditionne des ordinateurs californiens, « de bureau », devenus inutiles.
La Pomme bloque le système, l’ordinateur ne peut pas faire de mise à jour.
Il est alors impossible de l’utiliser, même d’aller sur internet, car les applications ont besoin des dernières mises à jour pour afficher le contenu correctement.
Fini les ordinateurs, (Re)tinAix les transforment en « écrans » somptueux ! & conservent cette haute résolution, cette marque de fabrique signée Cupertino.

La solution idéale pour tous ceux qui exigent une performance visuelle sans compromis !
Ces écrans bouleversés retrouvent leur place naturelle : au cœur d’un set-up écoresponsable.
Nous leur offrons une seconde vie - sobre, utile, belle.

Notre atelier est installé au pied de la Sainte-Victoire, à Aix-en-Provence.
Cupertino a façonné l’icône, nous en écrivons l’avenir.

Un projet local, artisanal, engagé.
À mi-chemin entre innovation, rationalisation et obsession du détail.

Name: Bang & Olufsen Maienfeld
Description:
Wir von Bang & Olufsen Maienfeld schaffen einzigartige Lösungen, technische Kompositionen, die eine harmonische Symbiose zwischen Funktionalität und Design, Sinnlichkeit und Technik bilden.

Unsere Dienstleistungen sind umfassend, unser Know-how fundiert, unser Verständnis für das Handwerk grundlegend und unsere Begeisterungsfähigkeit schier unendlich!

In uns brennt das «Feuer», das uns immer wieder nach der besten technischen Lösung suchen lässt.

Licht, Bild oder Ton sind wichtig. Das Erlebnis im Zusammenspiel jedoch, wird erst dann einzigartig, wenn Technik mit Sinn angewendet wird. Was dann entsteht ist die sprichwörtliche Technik für die Sinne.

Unsere Erfahrung zeigt, dass die Kunst oft in der sinnvollen Anwendung der zur Verfügung stehenden technischen Komponenten liegt. Und diese ist oft in der Einfachheit zu finden ist.

Wir vernetzen Technik mit Sinn; für Ihren Wohnbereich, Ihren Arbeitsplatz, für Bühnen- und Eventtechnik. Wir bieten Telematik für die professionelle Anwendung.

Unsere Lösungen sind nicht immer offensichtlich, immer aber einzigartig und vernetzt.

Im Grunde genommen ganz einfach.

Onze Missie
Onze missie is simpel: we maken alles groter op een handige manier. We streven ernaar om een eenvoudige thuisbioscoop bij jou thuis te creëren. Met draadloos en gemakkelijk streamen als speerpunt, zetten we alles in het werk om jouw kijkervaring moeiteloos en plezierig te maken.

Met trots kunnen we zeggen dat STOBE het nummer 1 beamermerk is in zowel Nederland als België. We hebben het vertrouwen van duizenden klanten gewonnen door te focussen op kwaliteit, toegankelijkheid en een moderne kijk op technologie.

Een Persoonlijke Benadering
Bij STOBE zijn we meer dan alleen een merk. We zijn mede-filmfanaten die de magie van het witte doek naar jouw woonkamer willen brengen. Onze benadering is persoonlijk en vriendelijk, en we staan altijd klaar om jou te helpen bij het creëren van je eigen thuisbioscoop.

De STOBE Belofte
Of je nu een filmavond met vrienden plant of jezelf onderdompelt in een solide game-ervaring, STOBE staat klaar om jou te voorzien van de beste apparatuur en service die je verdient. We combineren toegankelijkheid met een moderne, high-tech aanpak om ervoor te zorgen dat jouw kijkervaring altijd een groots avontuur is.

Dus trek die gordijnen dicht, zet de popcorn klaar en laat STOBE je meenemen op een reis door de wereld van onvergetelijke entertainment.

Welkom bij STOBE, waar elke scène een groter scherm krijgt!

Description:
E-Waste Scrap LLC: Leading Sustainable Electronic Waste Management

Welcome to E-Waste Scrap LLC, We are dedicated to pioneering sustainable practices in the electronic recycling industry. Our comprehensive business model is designed around the core components of IT asset disposal, electronic remarketing, recycling, and reuse—each focused on minimizing environmental impact and maximizing resource efficiency.

Core Services:

IT Disposal: E-Waste Scrap LLC offers secure IT asset disposition, ensuring that all data destruction and sanitization processes comply with the highest security standards while promoting responsible handling of electronic waste.

Remarketing: We specialize in refurbishing and reselling electronic devices, thus extending their life cycle. Our customers benefit from affordable, high-quality electronics that come with warranties, ensuring both performance and satisfaction.

Recycling: Our recycling processes are designed to be safe, efficient, and environmentally friendly, focusing on recovering valuable materials and drastically reducing the impact on landfills.

Reuse: We actively promote the reuse of electronics by donating or repurposing devices and their components, supporting a circular economy that encourages sustainable consumption and decreases electronic waste.

At E-Waste Scrap LLC, we are committed to simplicity and environmental responsibility. Our mission is to lead the way to a greener world through effective, innovative solutions in electronic waste management. Join us as we transform the future, one recycled device at a time.

iotics stands at the forefront of smart home automation technology, a testament to precision engineering and a keen understanding of modern living requirements.

Name: CapitalSound.ca
Description:
In February 2004, a 27-year old Canadian-born Antonio Romeo opened a small business to sell Monster Cable products out of his basement in Ottawa, Ontario Canada. Let's be clear, this was a much nicer space than how Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak started Apple out of the garage of Job's parents' home. Antonio started slowly and over the years built out four individual home theater rooms in his basement - one for each brand CapitalSound represented at the time: 1. Klipsch Room, 2. Kef Room, 3. Paradigm Room, and 4. Martin Logan Room. CapitalSound.ca was born.

Antonio's vision was to establish a laid back AV business with Italian Hospitality and Service. When clients come for an appointment he always makes it a point to greet everyone, and always offers a complimentary top-shelf drink, glass of wine, homemade Italian sopressata, Italian bread and finish off with an espresso corretto. It's a more friendly and relaxed environment to discuss what's most important for our client's next home theater or HiFi system. Client's become friends and they end up getting a great deal known in Ottawa as "The Antonio Price".

In 2017, Antonio moved CapitalSound into a commercial retail space located in the heart of Ottawa's Little Italy.
In 2018 CapitalSound becomes Canada's first full-line Klipsch Heritage Boutique.
In 2019 CapitalSound becomes the exclusive dealer for Steinway Lyngdorf - The World's Finest Sounding Loudspeakers
In 2020 CapitalSound becomes the North American distributor for Music Note Loudspeakers and Cables.
Stay tuned for more exciting changes currently in the works for 2021
Over the last 17 years, CapitalSound established itself from a small custom AV installer to now Canada's Largest Klipsch dealer. We have all the Klipsch Reference Premiere and all the Klipsch Heritage Speakers including the Heresey, Cornwalls, Fortes, LaScallas, Klipschorn on our showroom floor for you to demo.

Name: Dima
Description:
Dima, société à responsabilité limitée, est née de la volonté de son dirigeant, qui après avoir effectué ses études en Europe, où il acquiert une expérience professionnelle riche et variée, décide de retourner dans son pays d’origine en compagnie de son épouse afin de promouvoir les produits et services made in Europe.
A sa création, Dima avait pour objectif de vanter les atouts géographiques, démographiques, fiscaux, et stratégiques, de la destination Cameroun aux investisseurs européens, tout en leur fournissant conseils, assistance et accompagnement, durant toute la procédure. Mais au fur et à mesure, Dima s’est muée de société de service à société multi activités et est devenue de fait, le représentant exclusif au Cameroun et en Afrique centrale de certaines sociétés Européennes telles que :  ISKRA, TEM, TT Câbles.
Dima est désormais présent dans plusieurs secteurs de l’économie Camerounaise tels que : Le Transport, l'Immobilier, la vente & la distribution des accessoires électriques, la vente & la distribution des appareils de la ménagère, la Location de véhicules et le secrétariat bureautique.

Dima, a limited liability company, is born from the will of its leader, who, after having studied in Europe, where he acquired a rich and varied professional experience, decided to return to his country of origin, accompanied with his wife, in order to promote products and services made in Europe.
When created, Dima aimed to promote the geographical, demographic, fiscal and strategic assets of the destination Cameroon to European investors, while providing them with advice, assistance, and support throughout the procedure. Gradually, Dima moved from a service provider company to a multi-activities company and became an exclusive representative in Cameroon and Central Africa of certain European companies such as: ISKRA, TEM, TT Cables.
Dima is henceforth present in several sectors of the Cameroonian economy such as: Transport, real estate, sale & distribution of electric

Keychron este brandul global recunoscut pentru tastaturi mecanice premium, care îmbină designul minimalist, calitatea materialelor și performanța de top. De ce Keychron?

Confort și ergonomie – fiecare tastatură este gândită să facă munca și joaca mai plăcute.

Personalizare completă – switch-uri hot-swappable, layout-uri variate, keycaps customizabile.

Conectivitate modernă – Bluetooth multi-device, wireless 2.4GHz sau USB-C pentru orice scenariu.

Durabilitate – materiale premium și autonomie impresionantă a bateriei.

Design elegant – perfect pentru birou, acasă sau spații de co-working.

Keychron România susține atât creatorii digitali, cât și comunitatea de gameri și profesioniști care își doresc unelte fiabile, frumoase și adaptate stilului lor de lucru sau relaxare.

Pe LinkedIn, ne propunem să fim mai mult decât o simplă pagină de brand. Aici vei găsi:

Noutăți despre produse și lansări locale;

Sfaturi și inspirație pentru a-ți optimiza experiența de lucru și gaming;

Conținut creat împreună cu comunitatea – review-uri, setup-uri și povești reale ale utilizatorilor;

Oportunități de colaborare cu branduri și creatori din România.

Keychron nu este doar despre tastaturi. Este despre cum îți transformi orele petrecute la computer într-o experiență plăcută și eficientă.

Dacă îți dorești să descoperi universul tastaturilor mecanice premium, să faci parte dintr-o comunitate pasionată și să îți personalizezi modul de a lucra sau de a te juca, bine ai venit la Keychron România!

Name: Piezo Pickups
Description:
Our piezo contact microphone VIBE 1 is an affordable solution with an exceptional sound. Made and developed by two Slovenian innovators, engineers, musicians, friends and colleagues Simon Rezelj and Tomaž Zupančič.

VIBE 1 has a range of possible uses, most often as a microphone pickup for acoustic instruments (guitar, cello, mandolin...) , but it can also be used as a trigger for various sound and light effects and for interactive installations. With the help of custom-made double-sided 3M stickers, it can be easily attached to any musical instrument or the surface. With a slight twist, it can be removed and attached elsewhere. VIBE 1 demonstrates ease of use and reliability with great sound. Its big advantage over competing systems is that it has a 6.35 mm jack connector on the body, and it can be easily connected to an amplifier, recording device or guitar effects pedal with a standard guitar jack-jack cable. 

Every touch is sound.

Name: Spet Industria E Comercio De Ferramentas
Description:
SOBRE NÓS
Nós somos a Spet

A nossa história começa em 1975, quando a Spet foi fundada. Inicialmente, a empresa focava na fabricação de induzidos e bobinas, produtos essenciais para diversas aplicações industriais. Com o tempo e a crescente demanda do mercado, a Spet expandiu sua linha de produtos, desenvolvendo peças, acessórios e ferramentas exclusivas, que atenderiam a um público mais específico no ramo da construção civil, consolidando a venda no atacado, conquistando assim, um nicho significativo no mercado, tornando-se uma referência em qualidade e inovação tecnológica.
Hoje, a Spet transferiu sua produção para o exterior, uma decisão estratégica que visou otimizar custos e ampliar a capacidade produtiva. Nossa empresa mantém um rigoroso controle de qualidade, supervisionado por engenheiros e projetistas brasileiros, altamente qualificados. Essa supervisão garante que os produtos continuem a atender aos elevados padrões que sempre caracterizaram a marca Spet.
Dessa forma podemos também atender às novas demandas no setor varejista.
Com essa abordagem, seguimos crescendo e inovando, consolidando a posição de destaque no setor de construção civil e reafirmando nosso compromisso com a excelência, garantindo a satisfação e a fidelidade dos nossos parceiros ao longo do tempo.

Name: Wäeger Coffee Machines
Description:
Wäeger Coffee Machines, where precision meets luxury. In a market where 90% of drip / filter machines are plastic, we craft ours with real wood, metal, and glass. No microplastics, just pure coffee perfection. 

Inspired by the Swedish att väga (to weigh), Wäeger delivers barista-grade precision with sensors measuring 0.1g/1ml, wrapped in Scandinavian elegance.

Our journey starts with three models: The Lomma (with precision sensors and a 3" screen), The Aurum ($2,500, with gold accents, custom profiles), and The Simple ($500, manual operation). From our European hub, we manufacture sustainably, with plans to sell initially to European market, expanding to US in late 2026. We’re targeting the $250M premium drip niche, and our long-term plan is to expand to hotel in-room machines, pod machines, and office coffee centers.


From our European hub, we manufacture sustainably, initially selling to European market and expanding to North America end of 2026. We’re targeting the $250M premium drip niche market. Our long-term plan includes hotel in-room machines, pod / capsule machines, and office coffee centers. Always with quality premium materials, no plastics, and precision, our vision for a thriving luxury coffee brand.  

Founded by a Finnish entrepreneur living in Sweden, Wäeger blends heritage with innovation. We’re launching a Kickstarter later in 2025 to bring our prototypes to life, showcasing our no-plastic design. Join us to redefine coffee, back our campaign, become a co-founder passionate about luxury and sustainability, or follow us for updates on our journey. 

Follow us for updates on our prototype (wood, metal, glass and no plastic!), and let’s brew a revolution together. Wäeger: Precision. Purity. Luxury. #WäegerCoffee #NoPlastic #LuxuryBrewing

Name: ZOKI Elektronika
Description:
ZOKI Elektronika je uvoznik i distributer renomiranih svjetskih brendova potrošačke elektronike, s poslovnim modelom koji obuhvata maloprodaju, online prodaju i veleprodaju. Kao dio kompanije ZOKI Komerc, koja posluje od 1989. godine, te šire grupacije firmi LED Media, 2B Invest i AMS EX Group, ZOKI Elektronika doprinosi zajedničkom godišnjem prihodu od 150 miliona KM uz više od 200 zaposlenih. Kontinuiranim razvojem prodajnih kanala i jačanjem partnerske mreže, kompanija teži liderskoj poziciji na tržištu BiH u sektoru potrošačke elektronike.

*Maloprodaja i online prodaja*

Razvijanjem vlastitih maloprodajnih objekata i unapređenjem online trgovine, ZOKI Elektronika kupcima nudi širok asortiman proizvoda globalnih brendova, uz vrhunsko korisničko iskustvo i visok nivo usluge. Poslovanje se zasniva na inovacijama, konkurentnim cijenama i pouzdanosti, čime se osigurava dugoročna lojalnost kupaca i prepoznatljivost brenda na tržištu.

*Veleprodaja i distribucija*

Kroz snažnu distributivnu mrežu i strateška partnerstva, ZOKI Elektronika osigurava direktne ugovore s vodećim svjetskim brendovima, među kojima se ističe Samsung, globalni lider u potrošačkoj elektronici. Kompanija je ovlašteni uvoznik Samsunga za tržište BiH te ekskluzivni uvoznik i distributer brenda Frozzini. Zahvaljujući pouzdanoj logistici, efikasnoj postprodajnoj podršci i stabilnoj poslovnoj politici, ZOKI Elektronika ostaje ključni distributivni partner u ovom sektoru.

*Održiv rast i stabilnost*

Razvoj kompanije odvija se planski i kontinuirano, pri čemu se svi investicioni koraci finansiraju isključivo iz ostvarenih rezultata čime se dodatno učvršćuje povjerenje poslovnih partnera i kupaca.

*ZOKI Elektronika – Partner od povjerenja*

Snaga grupacije i ostvareni tržišni ugled uz postignute rezultate i strateške razvojne pravce garancija su sigurnosti i kvaliteta koji kompanija pruža u svim segmentima poslovanja.

Name: BingoBlue Electronics
Description:
Welcome to our world of electronics, where passion meets persistence and dreams come to life!

In the sprawling vastness of the internet, sometimes chance encounters create lifelong bonds. And that's precisely our story. Back in May 2008, the universe threw two young moderators on WikiAnswers into the same digital realm: Josh Anders, a 16-year-old with a budding web hosting enterprise and Kevin Croissant, an eager 13-year-old ready to dive into the world of web tech.

Perhaps it was fate or just the sheer speed of Kevin's reply (a record-setting 13 seconds after Josh’s post on the moderators' forum, to be exact), but that serendipitous interaction led to a deep-seated friendship. From sharing midnight conversations about server downtimes to launching Bobcat-1, a cubesat, into space in 2020, our journey has been nothing short of extraordinary.

The birth of TechMaster Electronics in 2011 was another key chapter in this tale. Though it underwent a rebranding to become BingoBlue Electronics within a year, the venture served more as a learning experience than a soaring success. But it was far from a setback. Every connection made, every failure encountered, and every lesson learned was a stepping stone, laying the groundwork for the online electronics store you see before you today.

So, as you browse through our digital shelves, know that you're not just shopping with another electronics store. You're engaging with a story of friendship, resilience, and sheer dedication to bringing the best of the consumer electronics world to you.

Here's to the next chapter,
Josh & Kevin

Name: Dreamtec Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Nasza działalność sięga korzeniami roku 1991 kiedy w ramach firmy KEN Technologie Informatyczne rozpoczęto sprzedaż sprzętu komputerowego. W 2005 roku założyciel i ówczesny prezes firmy Dariusz Szumiło podjął decyzję o stworzeniu pierwszego w Polsce interaktywnego systemu edukacyjnego opartym o technologię bezprzewodowych pilotów. Powołany został w tym celu zespół inżynieryjno-programistyczny.

 
Przez kilka lat system prezentowany był na wielu targach i konferencjach. Rozwiązanie zostało wdrożone w ponad 150 jednostkach edukacyjnych (szkołach niższych, uczelniach, instytucjach szkoleniowych i urzędach). Nabyte doświadczenie pozwoliło stworzyć rozwiązania dedykowane do różnych zastosowań: do testowania, głosowań, ewaluacji kadry dydaktycznej, do przeprowadzania quizów, ankiet i badań. Równocześnie poszerzyliśmy ofertę o kompleksowe wyposażenie audiowizualne sal szkoleniowych i prezentacyjnych.  Opracowana przez nas mobilna pracownia interaktywno-multimedialna z elektryczna regulacją wysokości tablicy interaktywnej stała się pierwszym na polskim rynku rozwiązaniem tego typu.

Name: HIFI BASEL
Description:
Ende der 80er entdeckte ich durch einen guten Freund meine Leidenschaft für HiFi und High-End-Audio. Mein erster Schritt in diese faszinierende Welt war der Kauf eines ONIX Transistorverstärkers aus England. Seitdem habe ich kontinuierlich in die Weiterentwicklung meiner High-End-Komponenten investiert und mein Equipment durch Upgrades auf verschiedene Hersteller ständig an meine hohen Höransprüche angepasst.

Mehrere lehrreiche Jahre als Filialleiter in der Unterhaltungselektronik haben mein Wissen und meine Erfahrung in diesem Bereich weiter vertieft. In den letzten 30 Jahren haben zahlreiche Marken, Hersteller und Komponenten meinen privaten Hörraum durchlaufen.

Heute biete ich meinen Kunden nur das Beste an, was der Markt zu bieten hat – und das zu Preisen, die auch für den Otto Normalverbraucher erschwinglich und bezahlbar sind.

Für mich stehen Klang und Qualität an erster Stelle. Jedes Produkt wird erst nach intensiven Hörsessions in mein Sortiment aufgenommen.

Es wäre mir eine Freude, auch Sie für die Leidenschaft des Musikhörens und -erlebens in klanglicher Perfektion zu begeistern.

Bear Electric was founded in March 2006 and utilizes internet big data for the research, design, production, and sales of creative small home appliances. It is a “creative small appliances + internet” enterprise with deep integration between product sales channels and the internet. Thanks to its diverse product line, high-quality products, and cutting-edge innovative business model, Bear Electric is well-loved by global consumers and has maintained rapid and steady growth. The company was listed on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange in 2019. From 2016 to 2023, its compound annual growth rate exceeded 20%, and its operating revenue in 2024 reached 4.758 billion RMB.

The Qinyuan Water Purification Division focuses on expanding the Chinese professional water purification brand “TRULIVA” in the Indonesian market. Truliva was founded in June 1998 and is a leading enterprise in China’s water treatment technology. It invented the world’s first water purifier designed specifically for water dispensers and the world’s first energy-saving instant-heating water dispenser without a thermal tank. To date, Truliva has obtained more than 3,000 authorized patents worldwide.

Dziś naszą firmę tworzą ludzie z pasją, a codzienny przypływ nowych klientów daje nam motywację, aby nasza praca była jeszcze bardziej efektywna.

Name: eChapa
Description:
eChapa is a digital marketplace and smart energy-insights platform designed to help Tanzanians make better, more efficient, and more affordable appliance choices.

Every day, consumers buy appliances based on price, brand, or appearance — yet overlook the most important factors: energy efficiency, running costs, and long-term performance. This leads to high electricity bills, frequent breakdowns, and unsustainable usage patterns that strain both households and the national grid.

We’re here to change that;

eChapa uses simple, easy-to-understand language to interpret appliance energy labels, compare efficiency levels, and explain the true operational cost of every appliance — empowering buyers to make informed, financially smart decisions.

For retailers, distributors, and appliance brands, eChapa offers a powerful digital channel to increase visibility, boost sales of efficient appliances, and build customer trust. Through features like Scan Ubora (QR-code insights), lead generation, and analytics dashboards, retailers can easily showcase the quality and efficiency of their products.

What We Do;

-  Interpret energy efficiency labels in simple language
-  Provide appliance insights on cost, performance & sustainability
-  Connect buyers with trusted retailers through our marketplace
-  Help stores drive sales using QR codes & smart product explanations
- Promote energy efficiency and behavioral change across Tanzania

Our Mission;

To empower every Tanzanian with the knowledge needed to choose efficient appliances, reduce energy costs, and adopt sustainable consumption habits.

Our Vision;

A future where appliance shopping is transparent, informed, and powered by data — leading to smarter homes, lower energy bills, and a more energy-efficient Tanzania.
Primary Industry: Retail Appliances, Electrical, and Electronic Equipment

Name: ElectroRoll
Description:
Electroroll HU

Bemutatkozás:
Az ElectroRoll, szakértői tudással és szenvedéllyel rendelkezik az elektromos közlekedés terén. Célunk, hogy elősegítsük a fenntartható közlekedést, és kiváló minőségű elektromos járművekkel, valamint hatékony töltési infrastruktúrával szolgáljunk ügyfeleinknek.

Szolgáltatásaink:

Elektromos Jármű Értékesítés:
Electroroll.hu kínálatában széles választékban találhatók a legmodernebb elektromos robogók, elektromos rollerek és elektromos kerékpárok. Kiemelkedő teljesítményű és környezetbarát járműveket kínálunk a városi közlekedés és a hosszabb utak számára.

Töltőberendezés Telepítés:
Szolgáltatásaink közé tartozik elektromos autó töltőberendezések telepítése ügyfeleink otthonaiban, vállalkozásaiknál és közösségi helyszíneken. Tapasztalt csapatunk biztosítja, hogy az installáció hatékony legyen, és minden ügyfél igényeit kielégítse.

Töltőberendezés Karbantartás:
Az ElectroRoll gondoskodik a telepített töltőberendezések rendszeres karbantartásáról és szervizeléséről. Ez magában foglalja az esetleges hibák javítását, a szoftverfrissítéseket és a berendezések optimalizálását a hatékony működés érdekében.

Ügyfélszolgálat és Tanácsadás:
A mi csapatunk mindig készen áll arra, hogy válaszoljon ügyfeleink kérdéseire, és segítsen nekik megtalálni a számukra legmegfelelőbb elektromos járművet és töltési megoldást. Tanácsadóink tájékoztatják az ügyfeleket a legújabb technológiákról és a helyi szabályozásokról.

Miért minket válasszon:
Tapasztalt és szakértői csapat.
Kiváló minőségű elektromos járművek és töltőberendezések.
Rugalmas és testre szabott megoldások.
Ügyfélorientált szolgáltatások és versenyképes árak.

Az ElectroRoll büszke arra, hogy részt vesz a fenntartható közlekedési forradalomban, és elkötelezett a környezetbarát mobilitás elősegítése mellett. 

"Elektromos mobilitás mindenkinek" - " Electric mobility for everyone"

Name: RIKELEKTRO AS
Description:
RIKELEKTRO ble etablert 01.01.2005 av Richard Masiello og Kim Eriksen. RIKELEKTRO startet opp som et nisjeselskap som skulle jobbe mot markedet for butikker og handel. Målet var i utgangspunkt å «hjelpe» svenske kjeder som etablerte seg i Norge. Dette viste seg å være en stort marked, ikke bare innen elektro, men også andre fag . Fra 2007 begynte vi å levere «nøkkelferdige» butikker til en del av våre kunder. Dette var et konsept som vokste og vokste for oss, og fra begynnelsen av 2012 ansatte vi både egne snekkere og malere slik at vi kunne «eie» hele byggeprosessen selv.

I 2017 ble vi godkjent som opplæringsbedrift for elektrolærlinger. Her samarbeider vi med Halden videregående skole og opplæringskontoret i Østfold. Vi har et mål om å være en bidragsyter når det gjelder rekrutering av fagfolk i vårt yrke. RIKELEKTO har som mål å ta inn 2 til 3 nye lærlinger hvert eneste år. 

I 2018 ble vi kjøpt opp av Instalco. Instalco ble startet i 2014 og består i dag av over 100 selskaper innen fagene, elektro, rør, sprinkel, kjøle, ventilasjon og prosjektering. I dag finnes Instalco i Sverige, Norge og Finland.
Vi er også med i Instalco Norge sin ledergruppe, der vi er med og deler erfaringer med andre Instalcofirmaer i Norge.

I 2019 startet vi opp serviceavdelingen i Halden, for å jobbe mot det private markedet i Halden og omegn. Med erfarne montører på laget, har vi blitt en samarbeidspartner for mange byggmestere i området.

I 2020 startet vi opp prosjektavdelingen, som skulle tapå seg større elektro jobber i Viken fylket. Dette er en avdeling som ble startet opp med bakgrunn i at vi har lang fartstid i bransjen, og noe som ville gjøre oss til en mer komplett leverandør.

Sommeren 2021 sluttførte vi vår første Instalco bærekraftige installasjon. Dette er noe som er viktig for RIKELEKTRO, da dette er et stempel på at vi tenker på miljø, sikkerhet og lønnsomhet i prosjektene vi gjennomfører. Fremover er målet at 90% av de større prosjektene skal være slik klassifisert.

Name: AgDrone.AU
Description:
The Future Is Aerial

Lyon Ag Solutions began in the hills of Nowendoc, NSW — with a single drone, a steep paddock, and a challenge that ground sprayers couldn’t solve. Founded in 2022 by James Lyon, a licensed drone pilot, electrical engineer, and former agronomist, the company was born from a need: smarter, safer, more precise solutions for rural agriculture.

What started as spray contracting has evolved into AgDrone.AU — a full-service agtech company combining drones, AI, product development, and automation tailored to Australian farms.

We don’t just fly drones — we solve real-world problems in the paddock, every day.
Our mission is to transform agriculture through technology that’s practical, precise, and farmer-first.

We exist to help growers do more with less — less chemical waste, less manual labour, and less guesswork. Using drones, AI, and automation, we deliver smarter tools that fit real-world farming challenges: rugged terrain, tight timing windows, and the need for data-driven results.

Our Vision

We see a future where autonomous drones, edge AI, and precision maps work together to reduce chemical use, protect the environment, and help farmers make better decisions, faster. From aerial spot-spraying to fully automated fleets, we’re building toward smarter, safer, more sustainable agriculture.

Lyon Ag Solutions + AgDrone.AU is the bridge between traditional practice and tomorrow’s tech. And it all starts here — with grounded experience and sky-high potential.

Name: Foto Flash Sdn Bhd
Description:
THE EARLY DAYS

Foto Flash Sdn Bhd, initially named Photo Flash Trading, was established in year 1992 principally involved in retailing of imaging equipment (cameras and films) and photo processing. Photo printing was huge back then, when Kodak cameras were the leaders of the market, and smartphones were non-existent. The company was later converted to a private limited company and opened our first outlet in Bangsar Shopping Centre (BSC).


The company's core business involves selling of all leading brands of products in the line of digital cameras, video camcorders, audio/visual gadgets, photo printers and related photography accessories. We have also actively participated in all major ICT events throughout the year including PIKOM PC Fair, Malaysia Mega Sales, Year End Sale, PC Expo, Single-Brand Roadshows & various events.


Aside from our home brand, Foto Flash is also the authorised retailer for other significant brands and have brand concept stores throughout Klang Valley such as Olympus Brand Store and Sony Centre. Foto Flash soon became a household name and a one-stop-shop for all digital imaging and photography-related products.


EXPANSION AND DIVERSION


Following the change in market trend and popular culture due to the introduction of internet which drove globalisation, Foto Flash then embarked on a progressive expansion scheme and opened our first gadget store in year 2007 under a subsidiary name called Flash Gadgets. With this new brand, we aim to create digital lifestyle convenience for all of our customers by merchandising only genuine and high quality products, along with our longstanding believe in providing great customer service.


Flash Gadgets now carries all major brands for gadget-related products, ranging from headphones, drones, fitness wearables, games, to speakers and phone accessories. Today, we have a total of 4 outlets in major malls (with another opening soon), and is expanding every year to cover all major towns and cities.

Name: Peachz Mobile Phone Accessories
Description:
Welcome to PEACHZ - the home of premium quality mobile accessories, designed to stand the test of time. Based in the beautiful country of South Africa, we are passionate about revolutionising the mobile accessory market with our innovative and highly durable products.

Our Mission
At PEACHZ, our mission is simple: we want to put an end to the cycle of disposable mobile accessories. We believe that our customers deserve better, which is why we've engineered our products to be long-lasting and reliable. We understand the frustration of constantly replacing broken chargers, cables, and car mounts, and we're here to change that.

Our Story
PEACHZ was born out of a shared love for technology and a desire to create something extraordinary. Our founders were tired of wasting time and money on mobile accessories that would fail them after only a short while. That's when the idea for PEACHZ was born - a brand that would elevate the accessory game and put an end to the disposable culture that pervades the industry.

Our Products
We specialise in a range of high-quality mobile accessories, including car mounts, chargers, and cables. Each of our products is meticulously designed and manufactured using the finest materials, ensuring unparalleled durability and performance. We take pride in our attention to detail and commitment to excellence, which is why we confidently offer a guarantee on our products.

Why Choose PEACHZ?
When you choose PEACHZ, you're not just investing in a product - you're investing in a brand that stands for quality, innovation, and sustainability. Here's what sets us apart:

Premium Quality: Our products are designed with the highest standards in mind, ensuring that they not only look great but also function flawlessly.

Durability: We've built our products to last, so you won't need to keep buying replacements every few months.

Innovative Design: We're always looking for ways to improve our products and make them even more efficient and user-friendly.

Name: TRIGAR.pl
Description:
TRIGAR to działający od 2007 roku największy, detaliczny sprzedawca produktów GARMIN oraz TACX w Polsce. Od początku naszego istnienia jesteśmy związani wyłącznie z jedną marką, co zaowocowało uzyskaniem tytułu Autoryzowanego Partnera. 

W naszej ofercie nie znajdziecie zegarków, liczników czy nawigacji innych producentów, gdyż w 100% poświęcamy się i specjalizujemy w sprzedaży produktów Garmin. Dzięki temu nasi eksperci nie muszą improwizować i naprawdę wiedzą co sprzedają!  

Centrala firmy mieści się w Poznaniu. Tu także znajduje się nasz główny magazyn, z którego codziennie rozsyłamy towar do siedmiu salonów stacjonarnych oraz do Was - naszych Klientów ;). Własny magazyn pozwala nam na bardzo szybką realizację zamówień. W większości przypadków na dostarczenie przesyłki do paczkomatów lub bezpośrednio pod wskazany adres wystarczą zaledwie 24 godziny!

Przez 17 lat zrealizowaliśmy już ponad 100 000 zamówień. Stawiamy przede wszystkim na wysoką jakość obsługi naszych Klientów, dlatego nie dość, że oferujemy wyłącznie produkty marki GARMIN, to dodatkowo wyodrębniliśmy w strukturach naszej firmy działy specjalizujące się w szczególnie wymagających zagadnieniach związanych z urządzeniami z segmentu MARINE oraz dedykowanymi do pracy z psami.

Oferowane przez nas produkty pochodzą wyłącznie z dystrybucji GARMIN POLSKA i objęte są jedyną autoryzowaną przez producenta 24-miesięczną gwarancją. Zapewniamy najniższe ceny przy zachowaniu najwyższych standardów obsługi.

Name: eBits.dk
Description:
eBits.dk er en dansk online elektronikbutik med en passion for innovation, kreativitet og kvalitet. Vores historie begyndte i 2020 som et lille hobbyprojekt, hvor vi ønskede at støtte studerende på Københavns Erhvervsakademi ved at tilbyde adgang til førsteklasses elektronikkomponenter. Det tog ikke lang tid, før vi opdagede den enorme kreativitet og varme, der findes i den danske maker-community – og dermed blev vores passion for at gøre ideer til virkelighed født.
Hvad Vi Gør:
Kvalitetsprodukter & Udviklingsudstyr: Uanset om du er hobbyist, professionel eller underviser, tilbyder vi et bredt sortiment af kvalitetskomponenter, værktøj og udviklingsudstyr – alt fra mikrocontrollere som Arduino og ESP32 til sensorer, kabler og loddeudstyr.
Support & Konsultation: Vi ved, at det ikke kun handler om at sælge produkter, men også om at støtte dine projekter. Derfor tilbyder vi avanceret sparring og specialiseret rådgivning, så du får den bedste start på dit næste store idé.
Uddannelse & Inspiration: Med vores eBits-Akademi og elektronik kurser hjælper vi både nybegyndere og erfarne at lære, skabe og realisere deres projekter. Vi tror på, at hver idé har potentiale til at ændre verden.
Vores Vision:
Vi drømmer om en fremtid, hvor kreativitet og teknologi går hånd i hånd. Vores mission er at være den første tanke, når du vil realisere en spændende idé – et sted hvor passion møder innovation, og hvor den danske maker-community kan blomstre.
Bliv en del af Fællesskabet:
Følg os her på LinkedIn for at holde dig opdateret om de seneste nyheder, projekter og trends inden for elektronik og maker-kultur. Sammen kan vi skabe en verden, hvor dine ideer bliver til virkelighed.

Name: Zazz
Description:
Welkom bij **Zazz** – jouw specialist in duurzame keukenapparatuur en elektronica!  Bij Zazz draait alles om bewuste keuzes en hoogwaardige producten die niet alleen goed zijn voor jou, maar ook voor de planeet. Wij bieden een zorgvuldig geselecteerd assortiment van A-merken, variërend van blenders tot koffiezetapparaten en elektrische tandenborstels. Wat ons uniek maakt? Onze toewijding aan duurzaamheid en kwaliteit.

### Onze Missie
Bij Zazz geloven we dat elke aankoop een verschil kan maken. Daarom streven we ernaar om de **beste prijs-groen verhouding** te bieden. We kiezen bewust voor merken en producten die bijdragen aan een betere, duurzamere toekomst. Van inkoop tot verzending en zelfs retourzendingen – alles wat we doen is zo groen mogelijk. 

### Wat wij bieden:
- **Duurzame producten**: Alleen hoogwaardige A-merken met een focus op milieuvriendelijkheid.
- **Bewuste keuzes**: We helpen je om slim en groen te shoppen.
- **Persoonlijke service**: Of je nu advies nodig hebt of een vraag hebt over je bestelling, we staan altijd voor je klaar via e-mail, telefoon of WhatsApp. Bij ons ben je geen nummer, maar een gewaardeerde klant. 
- **Kwaliteit boven kwantiteit**: We selecteren onze producten zorgvuldig, zodat je altijd kunt rekenen op duurzaamheid en betrouwbaarheid.

### Voor wie zijn we er?
Zazz richt zich op de bewuste consument die geeft om duurzaamheid, kwaliteit én gebruiksgemak. Of je nu je keuken wilt verduurzamen of op zoek bent naar energiezuinige apparaten, bij ons vind je altijd de beste keuze. 

### Onze kernwaarden:
- **Duurzaam**: Zo groen mogelijk, altijd.
- **Persoonlijk**: Altijd iemand direct bereikbaar.
- **Kwaliteit**: A-merken die lang meegaan.
- **Focus**: We kiezen bewust en zorgvuldig.
- **Behulpzaam**: Pas tevreden als jij dat bent.

Bij Zazz geloven we in een kleurrijke toekomst zonder verspilling. 

Sluit je aan bij ons en maak bewuste keuzes voor een betere wereld. #BeeBetter #Duurzaam

Name: Akkuplus.de
Description:
Die Firma Akkuplus ist ein E-Commerce-Unternehmen, es werden Produkte und Dienstleistungen online angeboten und verkauft. Es werden zwar auch vor Ort Aufträge angenommen oder Produkte vertrieben jedoch ist der Hauptvertriebskanal das Internet. 

Das Unternehmen verfügt auf der hauseigenen Online-Plattform über die größte Präsenz. Über andere Plattformen wie Amazon, Kaufland, Ebay, Hood und Metro wird ebenfalls angeboten, um die Reichweite zu erhöhen.

Die Akkuplus GmbH & Co. KG ist in folgenden Geschäftsbereichen tätig:

Hauptgeschäft

Vertrieb von Akkumulatoren und Batterien
Das Hauptgeschäft der Firma Akkuplus ist die Energiespeichertechnik, diese werden bei Großhändlern in Asien und auch in Europa eingekauft und im eigenen Online-Shop vertrieben.

Dabei wird grundsätzlich in Industrie- und Einzelzellen und speziellen Energiespeichern für ein bestimmtes akkubetriebenes Gerät unterschieden.


Die gängigsten Industriezellen sind, gemessen an der Absatzmenge, folgende Bauformen:

Lithium-Ionen Zellen der Bauform 18650 und Nickel-Metallhydrid der Bauform Sub-C.

Am häufigsten werden Energiespeicher für Anwendungen in folgenden Kategorien verkauft:

Auto- und Motorradbatterien / Smartphones / Kameras / Navigationsgeräte / Drohnen und Modellbau.

Akkuplus GmbH & Co. KG als Hersteller
Außer dem reinen Vertrieb ist die Firma Akkuplus auch als Hersteller tätig.

Konfektionierung von Akkumulatoren und Batteriepacks
Für sämtliche Anwendungsbereiche werden unterschiedliche Akku-Packs und Batterie-Packs hergestellt. Die Verbindung der Packs erfolgt nicht nur durch Lötzinn, sondern wird fachgerecht mittels Punktschweißgeräten durchgeführt.

Generell werden viele Bauformen angeboten und es wird auch nach Kundenwunsch konfektioniert. Folgende Kategorien werden am häufigsten produziert:

E-Mobilität unter anderem E-Bike, E-Roller und E-Golfcaddies / Werkzeugakkumulatoren zum Beispiel Akkuschrauber, Rasenmäher und Gartengeräte / Batteriepacks, die bspw. in Notstrombeleuchtung vork

Historia marki DEKO sięga 2013 r. kiedy to inżynier Robert Kok porzucił pracę w firmie BOSCH i zdecydował się stworzyć własną markę produktów zachowującą najlepszy stosunek ceny do jakości mogącej konkurować z dużymi markami. Realizacja jego wizji była możliwa po zawarciu współpracy z Azjatyckimi partnerami. Po dziś dzień marka jest rozwijana i zdobywa kolejnych konsumentów na całym świecie.

Produkty marki DEKO wyróżniają się jakością wykonania, trwałością i designem mogą się równać topowym produktom znanych marek jednakże są sprzedawane w niższej cenie dzięki temu wyroby te przedstawiają najlepszy stosunek ceny do jakości.

kupujesz bezpośrednio u wyłącznego polskiego dystrybutora marki DEKO, nie u pośredników

Our process is transparent, our turnarounds are fast, and our pricing is often the most competitive in the market — without compromising quality or safety.

We’re trusted for our ability to handle all aspects of electrical and lighting projects in-house, without outsourcing. That means consistent communication, uniform quality, and accountability from start to finish.

Recent work includes large-scale installations for public facilities, financial institutions, and property management groups, along with specialized projects requiring ADA sensitivity, advanced lighting controls, and future-ready electrical infrastructure.

Our values are simple:

Be fast, but do it right.

Be honest, even when it’s hard.

Treat every job like it matters.

Build partnerships, not just projects.

Many collectors own vast collections, often exceeding 50,000 cards, with new additions arriving regularly. Manually cataloguing these cards is time-consuming and tedious. Existing solutions are often expensive and geared towards businesses, making them inaccessible to everyday users.

Key Features:

High-Quality Scanning: Ensures precise and detailed scans, preserving unique card characteristics.
Effortless Cataloguing: Generates a CSV file with scanned card data, streamlining organization.
Affordable: Priced for accessibility, making it suitable for individual collectors.
User-Friendly Interface: Intuitive and easy to use, catering to all users.

Benefits:

Time-Saving: Reduces the time needed to catalog large collections.
Accurate Records: Minimizes the risk of human error in cataloguing.
Cost-Effective: Provides a budget-friendly alternative to expensive solutions.

Decksray revolutionizes trading card collection management by offering an affordable, high-quality scanner that simplifies the cataloguing process, Decksray empowers collectors to focus on their passion rather than the logistical challenges. Description:
Follow our Retail Lighting Showroom on Instagram @ArmstrongsLighting (https://www.instagram.com/armstrongslighting/) or Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/ArmstrongsNOLA).

In 1924 Harry L. Coulon, a salesman for the wholesale hardware firm 
Stauffer/Eshleman & Co., ventured into business on his own, opening a 
hardware store in New Orleans’ Seventh Ward, on the corner of St. Bernard 
Avenue and North Robertson St. He named his business H. Coulon Hardware. 

Just five years later, Harry’s fledgling store faced the onset of The Great 
Depression. His vision and energy allowed his upstart company to survive and 
prosper while hundreds of others were forced to close their doors. 
Harry passed away in 1931, in the midst of that Depression, at the age of 45. His business, renamed St. Bernard Hardware and Supply, continued on. 
Harry was succeeded by his sister, Louise Armstrong, and her three sons: Larry, 
Jim, and Eddie. The business later moved to a larger building on North Claiborne Avenue, a few blocks from its original location, and again to its current Orleans Avenue headquarters in 1966. 

One hundred years after its founding, “Harry’s store,” now Armstrong’s Supply 
Company, continues to thrive from two locations in the Greater New Orleans 
area. Scott Armstrong (great-nephew of Harry Coulon), and wife Leslie, the third-generation owners, continue to lead the company with the passion and values of our company's century-old DNA.  As a proud locally-owned family business, you can expect to be treated like family.

Cette détermination à fournir un service exceptionnel est le fondement de notre réputation et le secret de notre longévité dans ce secteur dynamique.

Innovation et Excellence Depuis 15 Ans

Dlaczego warto wybrać Wycinarnia.pl?


 Oficjalny dystrybutor Silhouette America w Polsce – gwarancja oryginalnych produktów i profesjonalnego wsparcia.

 Najlepsze marki w jednym miejscu – Silhouette, Cricut, xTool i więcej.

Name: Buyback
Description:
Repense, Reuse, Revolucione com a Buyback.

A Buyback é uma iniciativa inovadora no mercado de dispositivos usados. Oferecemos uma alternativa sustentável e acessível para consumidores conscientes. Nosso foco é promover a Economia Circular, proporcionando uma segunda vida útil para dispositivos recondicionados.

Nossa Missão

Democratizar o acesso à tecnologia de qualidade, oferecendo uma opção econômica e ambientalmente responsável. A Buyback se dedica a reduzir o desperdício eletrônico e incentivar um consumo mais consciente, transformando a forma como a tecnologia é consumida.

Nossos Valores

Sustentabilidade: Estamos comprometidos em reduzir o impacto ambiental, promovendo a reutilização de dispositivos e minimizando a necessidade de novos recursos.

Qualidade: Garantimos que cada produto vendido atenda a padrões de qualidade e funcionalidade.

Confiança: Oferecemos transparência total e garantias confiáveis, assegurando que cada cliente faça uma compra segura e satisfatória.

Nossa Visão para o Futuro

Vislumbramos um futuro onde a tecnologia de recondicionamento seja uma escolha predominante para consumidores em todo o mundo, criando um modelo de consumo mais sustentável. A Buyback aspira ser líder neste movimento, inspirando mudanças no mercado de consumo de tecnologia.

Venha fazer parte desta revolução! 
 
Com cada dispositivo que você escolhe reutilizar através da Buyback, você impacta positivamente o meio ambiente e ajuda a revolucionar as práticas de consumo e produção de tecnologia.
Essa revolução visa promover um modelo de negócios mais sustentável, que prioriza a reutilização, diminuindo o impacto ambiental e maximizando a eficiência dos recursos.
Explore nossos produtos e descubra como a tecnologia aplicada nos dispositivos recondicionados pode impulsionar essas mudanças.
Juntos, podemos repensar, reutilizar e revolucionar a economia circular, criando um futuro mais sustentável para todos.

Name: Canvas
Description:
It’s January 2020. The Canvas Desktop Lamp is a finished, working product. The packaging’s all set. The website’s looking good. But those doubts! Are we really ready to go live and start selling this thing? 

What if no one buys it? What if everyone laughs at it? At us?!

In the end, we’d put in too much work to stay scared. So we pulled on our big kid pants and Stuart launched the website. It’s not like anyone was going to actually buy anything, anyway. 

But when Stuart checked his inbox, there it was: our first order, sitting at the top of the emails happy as an ice cream sprinkle! We oohed and aahed at this amazing thing. A sale.

Then Stuart refreshed the page and another order dropped in! We had about six or seven by the evening. It was wild, seeing Canvas become a reality, one inbox refresh at a time.

And now Canvas is a brand—one that helps creators feel the buzz of sharing their passion and daring to build something that truly excites them. 

Oh, and this isn’t just a brand made for creators. It’s made by creators, too.

Description:
Diamond er et af verdens største leverandør indenfor storkøkken inventar med base i Bruxelles Belgien.

Selskabet bag Diamond Denmark hedder Inventarium ApS. Vi er et af Diamond Europe’s og mange andre fabrikkers leverandør i Danmark. Vi har i alt over 50.000 varer fra 25 forskellige leverandører fra hele verden.  Vi har egen import direkte fra fabrikker rundt omkring i EU, så du er sikret den bedste pris og den lavest mulige leveringstid på varer, som ikke er på lager.

En danskejet virksomhed; Vi kan med 100% troværdighed sige, at vi er en dansk virksomhed, som betaler skat og moms i Danmark, og udfører forretning indenfor en lovlig og etisk facon. Vi forventer også, at vores kunder også driver forretning på denne måde.
Siden 1985 har Diamond været et af de førende virksomheder indenfor distribution af professionelt catering- og køkkenudstyr til erhvervskunder. Vi tilbyder tusindvis af forskellige produkter, der rækker sig fra køleudstyr og teknologi til avanceret bageovne. 99% af alle vores produkter bliver produceret i EU, for det meste i Italien, som opfylder og overstiger kvalitetsstandarderne i industrien globalt.

I dag er vi med en omsætning på over 45 millioner euro et af Europas top 5 distributører af moderne og højteknologiske køkkenudstyr og produkter. Med et stort disributionsnetværk af over 2.500 kvalificerede forhandlere og installatører, har Diamond spredt ud til mere end 50 lande internationalt, hvor vi fortsat kombinerer professionelt køkkenudstyr med innovative kompetencer for at give den enkelte kunde en skræddersyet løsning.

Konkurrencedygtige priser: Vi er forpligtet til at levere cateringudstyr til alle vores kunder til en konkurrencedygtig pris. På den måde får de bedste varer til en pris, der ikke bare vil være en udgift, men en investering, der vil betale sig af de kommende år.

Name: Rolfs Elektro
Description:
Som frittstående elektroforretning, er vi stolte av å være størst på hvitevarer på Sørlandet. Med over 40 års samlet erfaring og engasjement, driver disse to butikkene i beste «Rolfs» ånd! I dag er det til sammen 17 engasjerte mennesker i arbeidsstokken.

Personlig service er det fremste nøkkelordet hos Rolf’s Elektro. Vi vet hvor viktig det er å skape tillit og trygghet. Når kunden kommer igjen og igjen, år etter år, da vet vi at vi har oppfylt kriteriene som er så uløselig knyttet til begrepet personlig service. Betryggende varekunnskaper og faglig kundeveiledning, er heller ikke ukjente begreper for kunden som har handlet hos Rolf's Elektro en stund.

Våre sjåfører kjører daglig i hele Kristiansandsområdet, og har faste ruter mellom Mandal i vest, Lillesand i øst og Hovden i nord. Ikke bare leverer vi varene kostnadsfritt hjem til kundene, vi bærer det også inn, pakker ut og setter på plass. Når vi er ferdig tar vi også med emballasje og retur av gammelt produkt om ønskelig.

Guides and Tutorials: Whether you're testing a generator, diagnosing a starter solenoid, or troubleshooting a trailer plug, our step-by-step guides make complex tasks easy to understand and execute.
Accessory Reviews: We also cover essential accessories and complementary tools, ensuring you have everything you need for your electrical projects.
Our Mission:
Our mission is to empower our readers with the knowledge and tools they need to tackle any electrical testing challenge. We are passionate about sharing our expertise and helping you achieve accuracy and efficiency in your work.

Why Follow Us?

Expert reviews and recommendations.

Name: Nocturne
Description:
Nocturne is a sound machine with advanced sound masking capabilities. We focused deeply on the few features that truly matter, and put them in a beautiful, timeless device that looks great anywhere.

We are launching soon on Kickstarter. Sign up for our email list at nocturne.shop and get up to 40% off when we launch!

OUR STORY
My ears have been ringing for seven years. It's a high pitch, and I can hear it over almost everything. 

But I noticed that in some environments like the shower, the ringing was less noticeable. Turns out this is the essence of sound masking.

One thing led to another, and I realized that the sound machine I had been using for sleep was not all it could be. 

Nocturne is designed to be the best sound machine for sleep and focus. We put our energy into sound masking and not needing a phone app. We said “no” to many features in order to be the best at what matters most.

I worked at Apple for the last nine years, bringing new products into production every year. For Nocturne we have already started tooling for manufacturing; in short we are pretty far along, with the biggest risks behind us.

You probably aren’t getting enough rest. We aren’t either. It’s hard! But we should try, because every sleep improvement will pay dividends in energy.

JOIN OUR EMAIL LIST AT NOCTURNE.SHOP
We are launching soon on Kickstarter, and want to have a big first day. It's how most successful campaigns do it. A strong start gets noticed!

We will email everyone on our list right before the campaign starts so that you know exactly when to go. In return, we are offering our lowest price on launch day (40% off). 

Thank you so much for considering our product and making our Nocturne dream come true. We would love to have your support!

Sincerely,
Russell
russell@nocturne.shop

Name: Pasotti Store
Description:
Dal 1964 ci trovate nel centro storico di Pavia nella piccola ma accogliente Via Volturno, traversa del corso principale Strada Nuova. 
Il negozio, con 8 vetrine, si sviluppa su 4 negozi dedicati a TV, Hi-Fi, Home Cinema, Elettrodomestici, Arredamento Tecnico… per una superficie totale di oltre 300mq.
Il nostro negozio si è sempre contraddistinto per la vendita di prodotti di medio alta qualità. Ci riforniamo direttamente dalle ditte e verifichiamo che i prodotti garantiscano buoni standard qualitativi. Questo ci permette di offrire prodotti affidabili e prezzi competitivi.
Conosciamo i prodotti che vendiamo! così da garantire un servizio clienti dedicato fornendo consigli tecnici e installazioni, configurazioni personalizzate.
Siamo anche disponibili ad effettuare sopralluoghi per consigliarvi la migliore soluzione per Voi.

Nella provincia di Pavia e zone limitrofe offriamo anche un servizio di consegna e installazione personalizzata gestito direttamente da noi. 
Per le vendite online utilizziamo corrieri affidabili come BRT con consegna a livello strada. (Per la consegna al piano ci stiamo attivando). 
Per i pacchi piccoli potete scegliere anche il servizio BRT FermoPoint per poter ricevere il vostro pacco nel punto di ritiro FermoPoint più vicino a voi senza doverlo aspettare a casa.

- Prodotti di qualità
- Personale altamente specializzato vi aspetta per meglio consigliarvi sull'acquisto di prodotti di alta tecnologia Audio, Video, Elettrodomestici...
- Da noi trovate sempre assistenza per i prodotti acquistati, sia nel periodo di garanzia che fuori garanzia

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to solve the spare parts challenge for leading appliance manufacturers. In a world where the Right to Repair is essential but often a hassle for brands, we provide a seamless, expert retail solution that turns a complex obligation into a simple, profitable partnership.

OUR STORY
Our company is built on a 40-year family legacy in the appliance spares industry. In 2021, we revitalised this deep-rooted expertise with a digital-first vision. By developing a powerful, user-friendly eCommerce platform, we transformed the business into a dynamic online leader. This strategic focus on technology and customer experience has been the engine for our success, allowing us to grow into one of the UK's fastest-growing retailers in our sector.

WHY PARTNER WITH ELECTRICSPARES?
We turn a common manufacturer pain point into a competitive advantage. We offer:
 Effortless Spare Parts Fulfilment
We handle the entire retail process for your spare parts, from professional listing and marketing to sales and customer service. This frees up your team to focus on its core business, confident that your parts obligations are being expertly managed.
 Enhanced Brand Protection
A frustrating spares-buying process can damage customer loyalty. Our modern platform ensures customers can easily find and purchase your genuine parts, reinforcing your brand's reputation for quality and support.
 A Proven Growth Engine
We don't just manage your parts; we actively market them. Our track record of nearly tripling our own revenue proves our ability to build markets and drive sales for the brands we proudly represent.

If managing spare parts is a growing burden for your business, let's connect. We specialise in turning that challenge into a seamless success story.
